!
route-policy mark
  if community matches-any sol then
    set local-preference 170
  endif
  if destination in (194.27.222.0/24, 46.234.12.0/24, 46.234.11.0/24) then
    set local-preference 170
  endif   
  set community ROUTE-KES additive
  done
end-policy
!
route-policy TE_IN_V4
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy TE_OUT_V4
  pass
end-policy
!

  if destination in (176.218.160.0/24, 176.217.240.0/24) then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

    pass
  endif

    done
  endif

route-policy ANKARA-M10-2
  if destination in Default then
    set local-preference 80
    done
  endif
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Voice-Customers then
    set community Customer-Voice-Subnetted additive
  endif
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    set next-hop self
    done
  endif
  if as-path is-local then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!

  if community matches-any Ulakbim or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ACIBADEM or community matches-any VFNET-KADIKOY then

  endif

    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

!
route-policy VCNO-BGP-IMPORT
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #TEST_ZULA
  if destination in (95.91.246.0/23) then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in GAME_Server_24940 then
    set local-preference 200
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  #Multihome_ISP_Redundacy_Vodafone_Best
  if destination in Multihome_ISP_Redundacy_Vodafone_Best then
    set local-preference 100
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done  
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    set local-preference 250
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (208.127.0.0/17) then
    set local-preference 300
    done
  endif
  #P3_FACEBOOK_OZEL
  if as-path in FACEBOOK_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  #CPN_To_VVF_Global
  if destination in Vodafone_Cpn_To_Global then
    set local-preference 230
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  #Google_DNS_Prefixes
  if destination in Google_DNS_Prefixes then
    set local-preference 220
    set community DO-NOT-ANNOUNCE-TNAP additive
    done
  endif
  #IVC_OPCO PREFIX
  if destination in (46.190.128.0/17, 37.25.128.0/17, 47.73.0.0/16) then
    set local-preference 160
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_AMAZON_OZEL
  if as-path in AMAZON_OZEL then
    set local-preference 250
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  #INSTAGRAM_VCNO_TUZLAProblem
  if destination in INSTAGRAM_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_YOUTUBE_OZEL
  if as-path in YOUTUBE_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_WHATSAPP_OZEL
  if as-path in WHATSAPP_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done  
  endif
  #P3_TWITTER_OZEL
  if as-path in TWITTER_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_MICROSOFT_OZEL
  if as-path in MICROSOFT_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  set local-preference 140
  set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
  done
end-policy

route-policy IC-VF-TUZLA-EXPORT
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any INTEROUTE and destination in UP-TO-18 then
    set community IR-PRFX-TO-VF-TUZLA
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any TTNET_TUZLA or community matches-any TTNET_ANKARA then
    set community TT-PRFX-TO-VF-TUZLA
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    set community TNAP-PRFX-TO-VF-TUZLA
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    set community TT-PRFX-TO-VF-TUZLA
    set community TNAP-PRFX-TO-VF-TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    set community TT-PRFX-TO-VF-TUZLA
    set community TNAP-PRFX-TO-VF-TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path is-local then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

route-policy SEABONE-BGP-IMPORT
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #TEST_ZULA
  if destination in (95.91.246.0/23) then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in (ios-regex '_32787_') and destination in (194.140.227.0/24) then
    set local-preference 170
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (208.127.0.0/17) then
    set local-preference 140
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in AKAMAI_OZEL then
    set community SEABONE additive
    set local-preference 140
    done
  endif
  if destination in (213.251.0.0/18, 212.115.128.0/18, 213.39.0.0/17) then
    set local-preference 280
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (8.8.8.0/24) then
    set community SEABONE additive
    set local-preference 240
  endif
  if as-path in Linkedin_Ozel then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #Turknet_Prefixes_over_Seabone
  if as-path in (ios-regex '12735.*') then
    set local-preference 160
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    set local-preference 235
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #kizlarsoruyor_content
  if destination in (172.67.64.0/20) then
    set local-preference 250
    set community SEABONE additive
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in FORTINET then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_AMAZON_OZEL
  if as-path in AMAZON_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #OZEL
  if destination in (204.110.124.0/24, 204.110.112.0/20, 96.9.160.0/21, 116.12.128.0/17, 185.158.96.0/22, 192.124.249.0/24, 68.232.34.0/24, 192.229.220.0/24, 194.50.84.0/24, 89.31.240.0/21) then
    set local-preference 250
    set community 6762:20339 additive
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in MICROSOFT_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in GAME_Server_24940 then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_FACEBOOK_OZEL
  if as-path in FACEBOOK_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #CPN_To_VVF_Global
  if destination in Vodafone_Cpn_To_Global then
    set local-preference 190
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #Google_DNS_Prefixes
  if destination in Google_DNS_Prefixes then
    set local-preference 160
    set med 5000
    set community DO-NOT-ANNOUNCE-TNAP additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  #AppleStore_Prefixes
  if destination in (17.253.34.0/23, 17.253.36.0/23, 17.253.38.0/23) then
    set local-preference 150
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #INSTAGRAM_SeaboneProblem
  if destination in INSTAGRAM_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set med 5000
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_YOUTUBE_OZEL
  if as-path in YOUTUBE_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set med 5000
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_WHATSAPP_OZEL
  if as-path in WHATSAPP_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set med 5000
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in CloudFlare_Deny then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_YANDEX_OZEL
  if as-path in YANDEX_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set med 5000
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_TWITTER_OZEL
  if as-path in TWITTER_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_YAHOO-UK_OZEL
  if as-path in YAHOO-UK_OZEL then
    set local-preference 148
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  set local-preference 138
  set community SEABONE additive
  done
end-policy
!
route-policy TUZLAVF-CGNAT-IPV6
  if destination in (2001:930:149::1/128, 2001:930:100::/48, 2001:930:130::/48, 2001:930:149::/48) then
    set local-preference 140
    set community Customers
    done  
  endif
end-policy
!
route-policy VFNETMNG-VRF-Export
  if destination in Internet-private-Loopbacks then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

  if extcommunity rt matches-any (15924:1723) and destination in VFNETMNG_KRON then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy to_sol_tier1_export
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #BLACKHOLE
  if community matches-any 34984:666 then
    done
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #F5 CLOUD Service
  if community matches-any F5_CLOUD_DDOS_Servis_Anons_Kes or community matches-any F5_CLOUD_DDOS_ALWAYS_ON then
    done
  endif
  #Only Announce TC Peering
  if community matches-any TC-Only then
    done
  endif
  #VF IP TRANSIT DO NOT ANNOUNCE
  if community matches-any VF_IP_TRANSIT_COMMUNITIES then
    drop
  endif
  #Garanti ATAK Gecici
  if community matches-any Garanti-Atak then
    done
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #Peering Bloklar
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    drop
  endif   
  #Drop2SoL_PNI
  if community matches-any DROP_SOL_PNI then
    drop
  endif
  #NETFACTOR-ANNOUNCE-REJECT
  if destination in NETFACTOR-ANNOUNCE-REJECT then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in (8.8.8.0/24) then
    drop
  endif
  # VFNET_ERLAB
  if destination in (212.15.16.0/20) then
    done
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS ET
  if destination in (31.145.48.0/24, 31.145.124.0/24, 31.145.162.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS KES
  if destination in IPSLA_PREFIXES then
    drop
  endif
  #VF_Mobil_Prefixes
  if community matches-any From_VF_to_TNAP then
    done
  endif
  #VF_Mobil_Undesired_announce_reject
  if community matches-any From_VF_to_IR or community matches-any From_VF_to_Local then
    drop
  endif
  # VFNET_DSL_INJECTION
  if destination in (81.8.82.0/24, 95.65.252.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #SPESIFIK_ANONS_TO_SOL
  if destination in (82.150.93.0/24) then
    prepend as-path 15924 3
    done
  endif
  # VFNET-Anons-Spesifik
  if community matches-any VFNET-CAMLICA or community matches-any VFNet-Koza and destination in (193.243.192.0/19, 213.194.110.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #Terramark_Kes
  if community matches-any Terramark then
    drop
  endif
  #ofis_ipleri
  if destination in (213.194.95.0/24, 31.145.9.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #Reject-Term
  if community matches-any Dont-Announce-to-Customers then
    drop
  endif
  #International-Pops
  if community matches-any International-Pops then
    drop
  endif
  #Network-Statements
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    done
  endif
  #DIL TEST
  if community matches-any DIL_WS then
    done
  endif
  #Datacenter-Networks
  if community matches-any Dc-Blocks then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Bgp-Customers
  if community matches-any Customers then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #Announce-to-Tnap
  if community matches-any Tnap_out then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_allocations
  if community matches-any allocations then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #blackhole
  if community matches-any blackhole then
    done
  endif
  #yurtici_blackhole
  if community matches-any TTNET-Sadece-yurtici then
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_primary
  if community matches-any announce_from_esentepe_atm then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_backup
  if community matches-any announce_from_esentepe_me or community matches-any announce_from_bostanci then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy F5_CLOUD_DDOS_Export
  if community matches-any F5_CLOUD_DDOS_Servis_Anons_Kes or community matches-any F5_CLOUD_DDOS_ALWAYS_ON then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

    drop
  endif

    drop
  endif

    drop

    drop

    done

    drop

  endif
  drop
end-policy

  done

    done

!
route-policy VFInternet_BGP_Import
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0) then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in (45.14.32.0/24) then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any EsentepeCer_Int_NNI_Primary then
    set local-preference 100
    set community PREF_100 additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (31.145.106.64/26, 46.221.13.96/29, 31.145.42.192/26, 31.145.83.196/30, 185.180.28.176/30, 185.180.28.192/27, 185.180.29.128/27, 31.145.4.144/28, 185.249.91.128/26, 195.46.143.32/27, 84.44.6.188/30) then
    set community PREF_160 additive
    done
  endif
  #Multihome L3 Loop Kes 
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community or community matches-any sol or community matches-any TTNet then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in REDFIBERDDOSONLY then
    set community DdosBgpCommunity additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any Multihome_ISP_Redundancy then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 170
    done
  endif
  if destination in (31.145.183.16/29, 31.145.183.116/30) then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community (15924:1100) additive
    prepend as-path most-recent 3
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any Other_Cers_Int_NNI_Primary then
    set local-preference 170
    set community PREF_170 additive
    done
  endif
  set community BGP-Customers additive
  set local-preference 200
  done
end-policy
!

  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/48
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then

  endif

    done
  endif
end-policy

  delete community all
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '9121.*') then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in (ios-regex '9074.*') then
    drop
  endif
  #SOL ortak_bgp_musterileri
  if destination in ortak_bgp_musterileri then
    set local-preference 160
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community sol additive
    done
  endif   
  #Accept-Route-sol 
  if destination in Accept-Route-sol or as-path in (ios-regex '^34984_') then
    set local-preference 170
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community sol additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

route-policy Qwilt_Cache_CDN_import
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then

!
route-policy TTNET-TUZLA-BGP-IMPORT
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #STRIP_COMMUNITIES
  delete community all
  #SET MED 100
  set med 100
  #DEFAULT_ROUTE_WITH_LOWER_LOCAL_PREF_HIGH_WEIGHT
  if destination in Default then
    set local-preference 50
    set community TTNet additive
    set community TTNET_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  #TT_PRIORITIZED_PREFIXES
  if destination in TT_oncelikli then
    set local-preference 145
    set community TTNet additive
    set community TTNET_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in TNET_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community TTNet additive
    set community TTNET_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in TTNET_47331 then
    set local-preference 230
    set community TTNet additive
    set community TTNET_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  #Google_DNS_Prefixes
  if destination in Google_DNS_Prefixes then
    set local-preference 130
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path neighbor-is '9121'  and as-path in TT_National_v3 then
    set local-preference 140
    set community TTNet additive
    set community TTNET_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  #LOL
  if as-path in LOL then
    set local-preference 140
    set community TTNET_TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  set community TTNet additive
  set community TTNET_TUZLA additive
  set local-preference 136
  pass
end-policy
!

  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0) then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #Multihome L3 Loop Kes 
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community or community matches-any sol or community matches-any TTNet then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any VFNET-ARBOR-BLACKHOLE then
    set community VCNO-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community Interoute-Test-BlackHole additive
    set community TT-BLACKHOLE additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_Static
  if destination in (89.207.15.0/24) then
    set local-preference 220
    set community PREF_220 additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in (ios-regex '9074.*') then
    set local-preference 140
    set community PREF_140 additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any Multihome_ISP_Redundancy then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 170
    set community PREF_170 additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any Other_Cers_Int_NNI_Primary then
    set local-preference 170
    set community PREF_170 additive
    done
  endif
  set community BGP-Customers additive
  set local-preference 200
  done
end-policy

    done
  endif
  if destination in (212.12.154.0/24, 212.98.229.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any TTNET_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any INTEROUTE then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any TTNET_ESENTEPE then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VCNO_ESENTEPE or community matches-any VCNO_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_2 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_2 then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any SEABONE then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IPT_TZL1_VCNO_EXPORT_V6
  #Reject-Smaller-Than-/48#
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop
  endif
  #REMOVE BOGONV6#
  if destination in BOGONS_V6 then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET Mobil IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2a00:1880::/32 le 42) then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2001:930::/32 le 42) then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    done
  endif   
  if destination in (2a01:718::/32 le 42) then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any PNI_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ################################
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN03 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN04 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN05 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN06 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN07 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN08 then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES * FACEBOOK TUZLA PREFIX
  if destination in (2001:930:b7:1::/64) then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any HUAWEI_CLOUD_IPV6 then
    drop
  endif
  #Only Announce TC Peering
  if community matches-any TC-Only then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_END ################################ 
  #BLACKHOLE
  if community matches-any VFNET-ARBOR-BLACKHOLE then
    set community VCNO-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community INTEROUTE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community TT-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community LUMEN-BLACKHOLE additive
    done
  endif
  #VF-Customer-PREFIXES
  if community matches-any Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IPT_TZL1_VCNO_IMPORT_V4
  #REJECT BOGONS_V4
  if destination in BOGONS_V4 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop  
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #TEST_ZULA
  if destination in (95.91.246.0/23) then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in GAME_Server_24940 then
    set local-preference 200
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #Multihome_ISP_Redundacy_Vodafone_Best
  if destination in Multihome_ISP_Redundacy_Vodafone_Best then
    set local-preference 100
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (208.127.0.0/17) then
    set local-preference 300
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_FACEBOOK_OZEL
  if as-path in FACEBOOK_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #CPN_To_VVF_Global
  if destination in Vodafone_Cpn_To_Global then
    set local-preference 230
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #Google_DNS_Prefixes
  if destination in Google_DNS_Prefixes then
    set local-preference 220
    set community DO-NOT-ANNOUNCE-TNAP additive
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #IVC_OPCO PREFIX
  if destination in (46.190.128.0/17, 37.25.128.0/17, 47.73.0.0/16) then
    set local-preference 160
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_AMAZON_OZEL
  if as-path in AMAZON_OZEL then
    set local-preference 250
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #INSTAGRAM_VCNO_TUZLAProblem
  if destination in INSTAGRAM_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_YOUTUBE_OZEL
  if as-path in YOUTUBE_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_WHATSAPP_OZEL
  if as-path in WHATSAPP_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_TWITTER_OZEL
  if as-path in TWITTER_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_MICROSOFT_OZEL
  if as-path in MICROSOFT_OZEL then
    set local-preference 210
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  ################################## EXCEPTIONS_END #########################################
  #DEFAULT
  if destination in Default then
    set local-preference 250
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  set local-preference 140
  set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
  set community IPT_COMM additive
  done
end-policy
!
route-policy IPT_TZL1_VCNO_IMPORT_V6
  #REJECT BOGONS_V6
  if destination in BOGONS_V6 then
    drop  
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/48
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ################################
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_END ################################
  #DEFAULT
  if destination in ipv6_def then
    set local-preference 130
    set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  set local-preference 130
  set community VCNO_TUZLA additive
  set community IPT_COMM additive
end-policy
!
route-policy Mapfre_Izmir_BGP_Import
  delete community all
  if destination in (85.119.32.0/24) then
    set local-preference 160
    set community BGP-Customers
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy PNI_TZL1_META_EXPORT_V4
  #REJECT BOGONS_V4
  if destination in BOGONS_V4 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT DEFAULT
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #ANNOUNCE MAGTICOM
  if as-path in ASN_MAGTICOM then
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OLD IPT/PNI COMM 
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT IPT COMM
  if community matches-any IPT_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT PNI COMM
  if community matches-any PNI_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #MOBILE FULL
  if as-path in ASN_MOBILE then
    done
  endif
  #FIX FULL
  if as-path in ASN_FIX then
    done
  endif
  #LOCAL FULL
  if as-path in ASN_LOCAL then
    done
  endif
  #CUSTOMERS 
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OTHERS
  drop
end-policy
!

  endif
  #REJECT IPT COMM

    drop
  endif
  #REJECT PNI COMM
  if community matches-any PNI_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #MOBILE FULL
  if as-path in ASN_MOBILE then
    done
  endif
  #FIX FULL
  if as-path in ASN_FIX then
    done
  endif
  #LOCAL FULL
  if as-path in ASN_LOCAL then
    done

  endif

end-policy
!
route-policy PNI_TZL1_META_IMPORT_V4
  #REJECT BOGONS_V4
  if destination in BOGONS_V4 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT DEFAULT
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #ACCEPT ROUTES BY AS-PATH&PREFIXES
  if as-path in ASN_META then
    set local-preference 170
    set community PNI_META_COMM additive
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community PNI_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OTHERS
  drop
end-policy

route-policy PNI_TZL1_RIOT_IMPORT_V4
  #REJECT BOGONS_V4
  if destination in BOGONS_V4 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT DEFAULT
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #ACCEPT ROUTES BY AS-PATH&PREFIXES
  if destination in PNI_TZL1_RIOT_PREFIXES_V4 and as-path in ASN_RIOT then
    set local-preference 170
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community PNI_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OTHERS
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy VFNETMNG_REDISTRIBUTION
  if destination in Primary_VFNETMNG_Prefixes then
    set weight 0
    set local-preference 200
    done
  endif
  if destination in Secondary_VFNETMNG_Prefixes then
    set local-preference 140
    set weight 0
    done
  endif
  set local-preference 80
  set weight 0
  done
end-policy
!
route-policy export_nothing_VCNO_SLA
  #IP SLA ANONS ET
  if destination in (31.145.48.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS KES
  if destination in IPSLA_PREFIXES then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Full_Route_For_Allot_Out
  if destination in (46.234.6.236/30) then
    drop
  endif
  done
end-policy
!
route-policy Microsoft-Peering-EXPORT
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any DO-NOT-ANNOUNCE-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT Seabone IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^6762_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^9121_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INTEROUTE PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8928_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT Superonline PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^34984_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^1273_') then
    drop
  endif
  #Magticom
  if community matches-any Magticom then
    done
  endif
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any Ulakbim then
    done
  endif
  #ISGLER 
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8386_') then
    done
  endif
  #MOBIL
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^15897_') then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^$') then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) BGP CUSTOMERS
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done  
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy SEABONE-BGP-IMPORT-TUZLA
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    set local-preference 50
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in TT_National_over_SEABONE then
    set local-preference 139
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in for_Pegasus then
    set local-preference 139
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in TT_National_with_VATHAS_BGP_Customers_over_SEABONE then
    set local-preference 139
    set community SEABONE additive
    done
  endif
  set local-preference 140
  set community SEABONE additive
  done
end-policy
!
route-policy TUZLA_TT_BGP_IMPORT_TEST
  if destination in Default then
    set weight 200
    done
  endif
  if destination in (1.0.0.0/24) then
    set local-preference 150
    done
  endif
  if as-path in TEST then
    set weight 1000
    done
  endif
  if as-path in TT_National then
    set local-preference 145
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

    drop
  endif

    set local-preference 70
    set community TT_IPV6 additive
    done
  endif
  set local-preference 95
  set community TT_IPV6 additive
end-policy

    set community Customers
    done
  endif
end-policy

route-policy from_AMAZON_tier1_import
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif   
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #Accept-Route-Amazon 
  if as-path in AMAZON_OZEL then
    set local-preference 260
    set community AMAZON_PEERING additive
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

    drop
  endif
  done
end-policy

!
route-policy TUZLA_CGN_IPv6_BGP-IMPORT
  #DSL BNG IPv6_STATIC_NON-CGNAT_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in DSL_BNG_IPv6_STATIC_NON-CGNAT then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 6762:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    done
  endif
  #ERENKOY_IPv6_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Erenkoy-IPv6-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET_ERENKOYISG additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18622 additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    done
  endif
  #AYDIN_IPv6_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Aydin-IPv6-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET_AYDINISG additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 6762:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    done
  endif
  #DENIZLI_IPv6_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Denizli-IPv6-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET_DENIZLIISG additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18622 additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    done
  endif
  #Izmir2_IPv6_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Izmir2-IPv6-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18622 additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    done
  endif
  #MANISA_IPv6_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Manisa-IPv6-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET_MANISAISG additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18622 additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    done
  endif
  #MERSIN_IPv6_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Mersin-IPv6-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET_MERSINISG additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18622 additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    done
  endif
  #IZMIT_IPv6_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Izmit-IPv6-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET_IZMITISG additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18622 additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (2001:930:149::1/128, 2001:930:100::/48, 2001:930:149::/48) then
    set local-preference 140
    set community Customers
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Turksat-Poc-Import-Policy
  if destination in Turksat-Poc-Prefixes then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community 1273:18611 additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Turksat_BGP_Customer_Full
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0) then
    drop
  endif
  #remove_rfc1918#
  if destination in (10.0.0.0/8 ge 32, 172.16.0.0/12 ge 32, 192.168.0.0/16 ge 32) then
    drop
  endif
  #test-ilker
  if destination in (195.87.78.0/24) then
    drop
  endif
  #Reject-Term#
  if community matches-any Dont-Announce-to-Customers then
    drop
  endif
  #International-Pops#
  if community matches-any International-Pops then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any VCNO_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VCNO_ESENTEPE then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any SEABONE then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any INTEROUTE then
    done
  endif
  #Network-Statements#
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any Dc-Blocks then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Upstreams#
  if as-path in Upstreams then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Bgp-Customers#
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Peerings#
  if community matches-any Peerings then
    done
  endif
  #Tr-1#  
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    done
  endif
  #Voice-Networks#
  if destination in (212.15.6.0/24, 212.15.13.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #bt_nw#
  if destination in (213.194.65.0/24, 213.194.64.0/20) then
    done
  endif
  #geri_kalan#
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy from_iqnet_AS44217_import
  if community matches-any VFLPREF70 and destination in Iqnet_Ipv4_Prefixes_forAS44217 then
    set community GTTLPREF70 additive
    set community TisLPREF70 additive
    set community VCNOLPREF70 additive
    set community LUMENLPREF70 additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community IQNET additive
    set local-preference 70
    done
  endif
  if destination in Iqnet_Ipv4_Prefixes_forAS44217 then
    set local-preference 200
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community IQNET additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy ANKARA_CGN_IPv6_BGP-IMPORT
  drop
end-policy
!

  if destination in VFNET-ARENA-PUBLIC-WIFI then
    set local-preference 130
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

    done
  endif
  drop    
end-policy

route-policy INTERNET_EXIT_TEST_SEABONE
  #ONLY_ANNOUNCE_FROM_HERE
  if community matches-any DROP_COMM_ONLY_GECICI1_TUZLA_INT_PRI then
    drop
  endif   
  if destination in (213.194.95.0/24) then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_128
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_128 then
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_144
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_144 then
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_160
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_160 then
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_176
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_176 then
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_192
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_192 then
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_221
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_221 then
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_0_0
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_0_0 then
    done
  endif
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_176_54 then
    done
  endif
  #MOBILE-ELSE
  if community matches-any MOBILE_ANKARA or community matches-any MOBILE_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  #VF MOBILE PURSAKLAR PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-IR or community matches-any ANK_BOLGE_BGP_CUSTOMERS then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET_BODRUMISG or community matches-any VFNET-ULUS-ODM or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG or community matches-any VFNET_MERSINISG or community matches-any VFNET_KAYSERIISG or community matches-any VFNET_BALIKESIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_AFYONISG or community matches-any VFNET-CAMLICA-ISG or community matches-any VFNET-BURSA or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY or community matches-any VFNET-KADIKOY or community matches-any VFNET-GTEPE or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIT or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT or community matches-any VFNET-ACIBADEM or community matches-any VFNET-FATIH then
    set med 20000
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET_ANTALYA then
    set med 20000
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!         
route-policy IPT_TZL1_SEABONE_EXPORT_V6
  #Reject-Smaller-Than-/48#
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop
  endif
  #REMOVE BOGONV6#
  if destination in BOGONS_V6 then
    drop
  endif
  #Test_IPV6_blackhole_PREFIX
  if destination in (2001:930:9a::164/128) then
    set community Customers additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    done
  endif
  #VFNET Mobil IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2a00:1880::/32 le 42) then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2001:930::/32 le 42) then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    done
  endif
  if destination in (2a01:718::/32 le 42) then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any PNI_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ################################
  #CLOUDFLARE
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^13335_') then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    done
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_END ################################ 
  #BLACKHOLE
  if community matches-any VFNET-ARBOR-BLACKHOLE then
    set community VCNO-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community INTEROUTE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community TT-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community LUMEN-BLACKHOLE additive
    done
  endif
  #VF-Customer-PREFIXES
  if community matches-any Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IPT_TZL1_SEABONE_IMPORT_V4
  #REJECT BOGONS_V4
  if destination in BOGONS_V4 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #FORCUSTUMER
  if destination in (41.33.0.0/17) then
    set local-preference 150
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #TEST_ZULA
  if destination in (95.91.246.0/23) then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in (ios-regex '_32787_') and destination in (194.140.227.0/24) then
    set local-preference 170
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (208.127.0.0/17) then
    set local-preference 140
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in AKAMAI_OZEL then
    set local-preference 140
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (213.251.0.0/18, 212.115.128.0/18, 213.39.0.0/17) then
    set local-preference 280
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (8.8.8.0/24) then
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    set local-preference 240
  endif   
  if as-path in Linkedin_Ozel then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #Turknet_Prefixes_over_Seabone
  if as-path in (ios-regex '12735.*') then
    set local-preference 160
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #kizlarsoruyor_content
  if destination in (172.67.64.0/20) then
    set local-preference 250
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in FORTINET then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_AMAZON_OZEL
  if as-path in AMAZON_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #OZEL
  if destination in (204.110.124.0/24, 204.110.112.0/20, 96.9.160.0/21, 116.12.128.0/17, 185.158.96.0/22, 192.124.249.0/24, 68.232.34.0/24, 192.229.220.0/24, 194.50.84.0/24, 89.31.240.0/21) then
    set local-preference 250
    set community 6762:20339 additive
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in MICROSOFT_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in GAME_Server_24940 then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_FACEBOOK_OZEL
  if as-path in FACEBOOK_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #CPN_To_VVF_Global
  if destination in Vodafone_Cpn_To_Global then
    set local-preference 190
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #Google_DNS_Prefixes
  if destination in Google_DNS_Prefixes then
    set local-preference 160
    set med 5000
    set community DO-NOT-ANNOUNCE-TNAP additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #AppleStore_Prefixes
  if destination in (17.253.34.0/23, 17.253.36.0/23, 17.253.38.0/23) then
    set local-preference 150
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #INSTAGRAM_SeaboneProblem
  if destination in INSTAGRAM_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set med 5000
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_YOUTUBE_OZEL
  if as-path in YOUTUBE_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set med 5000
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_WHATSAPP_OZEL
  if as-path in WHATSAPP_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set med 5000
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  if as-path in CloudFlare_Deny then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif   
  #P3_YANDEX_OZEL
  if as-path in YANDEX_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set med 5000
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_TWITTER_OZEL
  if as-path in TWITTER_OZEL then
    set local-preference 200
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  #P3_YAHOO-UK_OZEL
  if as-path in YAHOO-UK_OZEL then
    set local-preference 148
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  ################################## EXCEPTIONS_END #########################################
  #DEFAULT
  if destination in Default then
    set local-preference 235
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  set local-preference 138
  set community SEABONE additive
  set community IPT_COMM additive
  done
end-policy
!
route-policy IPT_TZL1_SEABONE_IMPORT_V6
  #REJECT BOGONS_V6
  if destination in BOGONS_V6 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/48
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ################################
  if destination in (2a03:2880:f10c::/48) then
    set local-preference 145
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_END ################################
  #DEFAULT
  if destination in ipv6_def then
    set local-preference 130
    set community SEABONE additive
    set community IPT_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  set local-preference 130
  set community SEABONE additive
  set community IPT_COMM additive
end-policy
!
route-policy NOKIA-DEEPFIELD-Full_Route
  done
end-policy
!
route-policy PNI_TZL1_TENCENT_EXPORT_V4
  #REJECT BOGONS_V4
  if destination in BOGONS_V4 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT DEFAULT
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT OLD IPT/PNI COMM 
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT IPT COMM
  if community matches-any IPT_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT PNI COMM
  if community matches-any PNI_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #MOBILE FULL
  if as-path in ASN_MOBILE then
    done
  endif
  #FIX FULL
  if as-path in ASN_FIX then
    done  
  endif
  #LOCAL FULL
  if as-path in ASN_LOCAL then
    done
  endif
  #CUSTOMERS 
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OTHERS
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy PNI_TZL1_TENCENT_EXPORT_V6
  #REJECT BOGONS_V6
  if destination in BOGONS_V6 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/48
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT DEFAULT
  if destination in ipv6_def then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT OLD IPT/PNI COMM 
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT IPT COMM
  if community matches-any IPT_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT PNI COMM
  if community matches-any PNI_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #MOBILE FULL
  if as-path in ASN_MOBILE then
    done
  endif
  #FIX FULL
  if as-path in ASN_FIX then
    done
  endif
  #LOCAL FULL
  if as-path in ASN_LOCAL then
    done
  endif
  #CUSTOMERS 
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OTHERS
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy PNI_TZL1_TENCENT_IMPORT_V4
  #REJECT BOGONS_V4
  if destination in BOGONS_V4 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT DEFAULT
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #ACCEPT ROUTES BY AS-PATH&PREFIXES
  if destination in PNI_TZL1_TENCENT_PREFIXES_V4 and as-path in ASN_TENCENT then
    set local-preference 170
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community PNI_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OTHERS
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy PNI_TZL1_TENCENT_IMPORT_V6
  #REJECT BOGONS_V6
  if destination in BOGONS_V6 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/48
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT DEFAULT
  if destination in ipv6_def then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #ACCEPT ROUTES BY AS-PATH&PREFIXES
  if destination in PNI_TZL1_TENCENT_PREFIXES_V6 and as-path in ASN_TENCENT then
    set local-preference 170
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community PNI_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OTHERS
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy TUZLA-CGN3-IPv6-BGP-Import
  #INCITY BNG IPv6_STATIC_NON-CGNAT_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in INCITY_BNG_IPv6_STATIC_NON-CGNAT then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18611 additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    done
  endif
  #ACIBADEM_1_IPv6_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Acibadem-1-IPv6-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-ACIBADEM additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18611 additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    done
  endif
  #ACIBADEM_2_IPv6_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Acibadem-2-IPv6-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-ACIBADEM additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18611 additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    done
  endif
  #KADIKOY_IPv6_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Kadikoy-IPv6-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-KADIKOY additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_secondary additive
    set community 8928:15021 additive
    set community VCNO_PRIMARY_ESEYURT_INT1_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    done
  endif
  #BURSA2_IPv6_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Bursa2-IPv6-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 240
    set community VFNET-BURSA additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 3356:15911 additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy TUZLA-GOOGLE-DENEME-EXPORT
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any DO-NOT-ANNOUNCE-TNAP then
    drop  
  endif
  #REJECT COGENT IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^174_') then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^6762_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^9121_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INTEROUTE PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8928_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT Superonline PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^34984_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^1273_') then
    drop
  endif
  #Google_Private_Deneme
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG or community matches-any VFNET_ANTALYAISG or community matches-any VFNET_IZMITISG or community matches-any VFNET-ULUS-ODM or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT or community matches-any VFNET-ANKARA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET_AFYONISG or community matches-any VFNET_BALIKESIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_MANISAISG or community matches-any VFNET-ANTALYA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAFTTHISG or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIR_FTTH then
    prepend as-path 15924 2
    drop
  endif
  #VODAFONE_MOBILE
  if community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR1 or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR2 or community matches-any VF-ESY-Catch_All then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-GGSN or community matches-any VF-PSK-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ERZ-GGSN or community matches-any VF-SAM-GGSN or community matches-any VF-DYB-GGSN then
    prepend as-path 15924 2
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN or community matches-any VF-TZL-Catch_All then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-GZM-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ANT-GGSN or community matches-any VF-GZM-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ADN-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ADN-Catch_All then
    prepend as-path 15924 2
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET-CAMLICAISG or community matches-any VFNET-GTEPE or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY-2 or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAFTTHISG or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPE_FTTH then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any Ulakbim then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any Magticom then
    done
  endif
  #ISGLER
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8386_') then
    done
  endif
  #MOBIL
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^15897_') then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) BGP CUSTOMERS
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Tuzla-VCNO-IPv6-BGP-Import
  delete community all
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/48
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_Unique_Local_Addresses
  if destination in Reject-RFC4193-IPv6 then
    drop
  endif
  #Default
  if destination in ipv6_def then
    set local-preference 130
    set community VCNO_IPV6 additive
    done
  endif
  set local-preference 130
  set community VCNO_IPV6 additive
end-policy
!
route-policy Vodafone_Mobile_BGP-IMPORT
  if destination in (176.219.216.0/22) then
    drop
  endif
  #BTK-DNS-PREFIXES
  if destination in (185.67.34.0/24, 185.67.32.0/24) then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 180
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  #Mobile_DNS_FB_Caching
  if destination in (212.65.128.0/19) then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 160
    set community IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  #COPS-AGENTS-PREFIXES

    set local-preference 160

    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive

    set community 1273:18622 additive

    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive

    done
  endif

    done
  endif

    set community IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community GGC-High-Preference additive
    set community GGC-4G-Services additive
    set community 1273:15721 additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-ESY-Catch_All then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 160
    set community IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community GGC-High-Preference additive
    set community GGC-4G-Services additive
    set community 1273:15721 additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-IR or community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-TT or community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-TNAP or community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-IR or community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-TT or community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-TNAP and destination in VF-MOBILE-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 160
    set community ANK_BOLGE_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community MOBILE_TUZLA additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community GGC-High-Preference additive
    set community GGC-4G-Services additive
    set community 1273:15721 additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_192 then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 160
    set community ANK_BOLGE_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community GGC-High-Preference additive
    set community GGC-4G-Services additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community 1273:15721 additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Vodafone_Mobile_BGP_EXPORT
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0) then
    done
  endif
  if destination in (89.207.15.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any MOBIL-INTERNAL-DDOS-MITIGATION then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Vodafone_Origin_BGP_Export
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #Reject-Term-TC-Only
  if community matches-any TC-Only then
    drop
  endif
  #GECICI_IQNET
  if as-path passes-through '44217'  then
    drop
  endif
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #Drop2Akamai_PNI
  if community matches-any DROP_AKAMAI_PNI then
    drop
  endif
  #VF_Mobil_Prefixes
  if community matches-any ANK_BOLGE_BGP_CUSTOMERS or community matches-any IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS then
    done
  endif
  # VFNET_DSL_INJECTION
  if destination in (81.8.82.0/24, 95.65.252.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #ofis_ipleri
  if destination in (213.194.95.0/24, 31.145.9.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #Reject-Term
  if community matches-any Dont-Announce-to-Customers then
    drop
  endif
  #International-Pops
  if community matches-any International-Pops then
    drop
  endif
  #Network-Statements
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    done
  endif
  #Datacenter-Networks
  if community matches-any Dc-Blocks then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Bgp-Customers
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_allocations
  if community matches-any allocations then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #yurtici_blackhole
  if community matches-any TTNET-Sadece-yurtici then
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_primary
  if community matches-any announce_from_esentepe_atm then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_backup
  if community matches-any announce_from_esentepe_me or community matches-any announce_from_bostanci then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy from_ZenLayer_tier1_import
  delete community all
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '9121.*') then
    drop
  endif
  #ZenLayer NW
  if destination in ZenLayer-Prefixes and as-path in (ios-regex '^21859_') then
    set local-preference 220
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community ZenLayer additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy from_iqnet_AS201996_import
  if destination in Iqnet_Ipv4_Prefixes_forAS201996 and as-path in (ios-regex '^201996_') then
    set local-preference 200
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy from_sol_tier1_import_yeni
  delete community all
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop  
  endif
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '9121.*') then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in ISNET then
    set local-preference 172
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community sol additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in ISG_IP_Transit_Service_Over_SOL then
    set community ISG_SOL_RR_Deny additive
    done
  endif
  #SOL ortak_bgp_musterileri
  if destination in ortak_bgp_musterileri then
    set local-preference 160
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community sol additive
    done
  endif
  #Accept-Route-sol 
  if destination in Accept-Route-sol or as-path in (ios-regex '^34984_') then
    set local-preference 170
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community sol additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!

  delete community all
  if destination in (194.29.214.0/24, 217.68.220.0/24) then
    set local-preference 200
    set community 6762:18611 additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (194.29.208.0/21, 194.29.214.0/24, 91.188.192.0/22, 194.29.215.0/24, 217.68.208.0/20, 217.68.209.0/24, 217.68.217.0/24, 194.29.208.0/24, 194.29.209.0/24, 194.29.210.0/24, 194.29.211.0/24, 194.29.212.0/24, 194.29.213.0/24, 217.68.208.0/24, 217.68.210.0/24, 217.68.211.0/24, 217.68.212.0/24, 217.68.213.0/24, 217.68.214.0/24, 217.68.215.0/24, 217.68.216.0/24, 217.68.218.0/24, 217.68.219.0/24, 217.68.220.0/24, 217.68.220.0/24, 217.68.222.0/24, 217.68.223.0/24, 194.29.208.0/21, 194.29.214.0/23, 194.29.212.0/23, 194.29.210.0/23, 194.29.208.0/23, 194.29.208.0/22, 194.29.212.0/22, 217.68.208.0/20, 217.68.208.0/23, 217.68.210.0/23, 217.68.212.0/23, 217.68.214.0/23, 217.68.216.0/23, 217.68.218.0/23, 217.68.220.0/23, 217.68.222.0/23, 217.68.208.0/22, 217.68.212.0/22, 217.68.216.0/22, 217.68.220.0/22, 217.68.208.0/21, 217.68.216.0/21) then

route-policy Only_Vodafone_Origin_Export
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0) then
    drop
  endif
  #Reject-Smaller-Than-/24#
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0 ge 25) then
    drop
  endif
  #remove_rfc1918#
  if destination in (10.0.0.0/8 ge 32, 172.16.0.0/12 ge 32, 192.168.0.0/16 ge 32) then
    drop
  endif
  #Reject-Term#
  if community matches-any Dont-Announce-to-Customers then
    drop
  endif
  #Datacenter-Networks#
  if community matches-any Dc-Blocks then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Bgp-Customers#
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  if as-path in VATHAS_BGP_Customers then
    done
  endif
  if as-path is-local then
    done
  endif
  if as-path originates-from '15924'  then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

  endif

end-policy

    done

end-policy

end-policy
!
route-policy Tuzla-Google-Caching-EXPORT
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any DO-NOT-ANNOUNCE-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT Seabone IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^6762_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^9121_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT COLT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^3356_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INTEROUTE PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8928_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT Superonline PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^34984_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^1273_') then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any GGC_Offload then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPE_FTTH then
    drop
  endif
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any Magticom then
    drop
  endif
  #VODAFONE_MOBILE
  if community matches-any VF-ERZ-GGSN or community matches-any VF-SAM-GGSN or community matches-any VF-DYB-GGSN then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR1 or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR2 or community matches-any VF-ESY-Catch_All then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-GGSN or community matches-any VF-PSK-Catch_All then
    prepend as-path 15924 2
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN or community matches-any VF-TZL-Catch_All then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-GZM-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ANT-GGSN or community matches-any VF-GZM-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ADN-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ADN-Catch_All then
    prepend as-path 15924 2
    done
  endif
  #MOBIL
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^15897_') then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^$') then
    done
  endif
  #FIX
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8386_') then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) BGP CUSTOMERS
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

route-policy from_Microsoft_tier1_import
  delete community all
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '9121.*') then
    drop
  endif
  #Microsoft NW
  if destination in Microsoft_Prefixes and as-path in (ios-regex '^8075_') then
    set local-preference 220
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy ARBOR-EBGP-IMPORT-PROTECTION
  if destination in Ulakbim_Ulkanet_DDOS_Prefixes then
    set community Ulakbim_Ddos
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VFNET-ARBOR-BLACKHOLE then
    set community VCNO-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community INTEROUTE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community TT-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community LUMEN-BLACKHOLE additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in PFX-PROTECTED-VF-DMZ then
    set community MOBIL-INTERNAL-DDOS-MITIGATION additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in Reject_SPC_IPs_From_Arbor then
    drop
  endif
  #Arbor_Redundancy
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    set local-preference 200
    set community Arbor_Redundancy additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    set local-preference 200
    set community ARBOR-EXPECTED-COMMUNITIES additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy BGP-CUSTOMER-DEFAULT-GW-ONLY
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0) then
    replace as-path '15924' 
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
