!
route-policy PNI_TZL1_MICROSOFT_EXPORT_V4
  #REJECT BOGONS_V4
  if destination in BOGONS_V4 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT DEFAULT
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT OLD IPT/PNI COMM 
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT IPT COMM
  if community matches-any IPT_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT PNI COMM
  if community matches-any PNI_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #MOBILE FULL
  if as-path in ASN_MOBILE then
    done
  endif
  #FIX FULL
  if as-path in ASN_FIX then
    done
  endif
  #LOCAL FULL
  if as-path in ASN_LOCAL then
    done
  endif
  #CUSTOMERS 
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OTHERS
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy PNI_TZL1_MICROSOFT_EXPORT_V6
  #REJECT BOGONS_V6
  if destination in BOGONS_V6 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/48
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT DEFAULT
  if destination in ipv6_def then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT OLD IPT/PNI COMM 
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT IPT COMM
  if community matches-any IPT_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT PNI COMM
  if community matches-any PNI_COMM then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #MOBILE FULL
  if as-path in ASN_MOBILE then
    done
  endif
  #FIX FULL
  if as-path in ASN_FIX then
    done
  endif
  #LOCAL FULL
  if as-path in ASN_LOCAL then
    done
  endif   
  #CUSTOMERS 
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OTHERS
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy PNI_TZL1_MICROSOFT_IMPORT_V4
  #REJECT BOGONS_V4
  if destination in BOGONS_V4 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT DEFAULT
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #ACCEPT ROUTES BY AS-PATH&PREFIXES
  if destination in PNI_TZL1_MICROSOFT_PREFIXES_V4 and as-path in ASN_MICROSOFT then
    set local-preference 170
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community PNI_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OTHERS
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy PNI_TZL1_MICROSOFT_IMPORT_V6
  #REJECT BOGONS_V6
  if destination in BOGONS_V6 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/48
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_LONG_AS_PATH
  if as-path length ge 50 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT DEFAULT
  if destination in ipv6_def then
    drop
  endif
  ################################ EXCEPTIONS_BEGIN ###########################################
  #ACCEPT ROUTES BY AS-PATH&PREFIXES
  if as-path in ASN_MICROSOFT then
    set local-preference 170
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community PNI_COMM additive
    done
  endif
  ################################  EXCEPTIONS_END  ###########################################
  #REJECT OTHERS
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy STATIC_ROUTE_ANNOUNCE_POLICY
  #TIB DISCARD ROUTES
  if tag is 10 then
    drop
  endif
  #VF Upstream BlackHole
  if tag is 666 then
    set community VCNO-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community Interoute_Blackhole_to_Transits additive
    set community Interoute_Blackhole_to_Any_Peers additive
    done
  endif
  #F5 ALWAYS ON SERVICE
  if tag is 97 then
    set community F5_CLOUD_DDOS_ALWAYS_ON additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  #TC ONLY
  if tag is 98 then
    set community TC-Only additive
    done
  endif
  #F5 Cloud Service
  if tag is 99 then
    set community F5_CLOUD_DDOS_Servis_Anons_Kes additive
    done
  endif
  #VATHAS MAIN NETWORK STATEMENTS
  if tag is 30 then
    set community Bgp-Main-Network-Statements additive
    set community ANNOUNCE-FROM-ESENTEPE-ME additive
    set community ALLOCATIONS additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    done  
  endif
  #KOC MAIN NETWORK STATEMENTS
  if tag is 1903 then
    set community Bgp-Main-Network-Statements additive
    done
  endif
  #BLACKHOLE TEST
  if tag is 3801 then
    set community VCNO-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community Interoute-Test-BlackHole additive
    set community TT-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community 34984:666 additive
    done
  endif
  #VF test
  if tag is 1592440 then
    set community DONT-ANNOUNCE-TO-INTEROUTE additive
    done
  endif
  #ESKI KN BLACKHOLE
  if tag is 40 then
    set community TT-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community VFNET-KOZA additive
    set community VFNET-CAMLICA additive
    done
  endif
  #ESNINT3 HOSTING BLACKHOLE
  if tag is 912115833 then
    set community 9121:15833 additive
    done
  endif
  #VF MOBILE BLACKHOLE
  if tag is 50 then
    set community TT-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-TT additive
    set community VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-TT additive
    done
  endif
  #TRAFIC MANUPILATION CUSTOMERS P-1273 IZMIR
  if tag is 1273128 then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community SEABONE_TUZLA_SECONDARY additive
    set community VCNO_IZMIR_INT1_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    done
  endif
  #TRAFIC MANUPILATION CUSTOMERS P-6762 S-8928
  if tag is 67628928 then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community 6762:18611 additive
    set community IR_ESN_1_SECONDARY additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    done
  endif   
  #TRAFIC MANUPILATION CUSTOMERS P-6762 S-1273
  if tag is 67621273 then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community 6762:18611 additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    done
  endif
  #TRAFIC MANUPILATION CUSTOMERS P-8928 S-6762
  if tag is 89286762 then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community IR_1_ESENTEPE_MX960 additive
    set community SEABONE_TUZLA_SECONDARY additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    done
  endif
  #TRAFIC MANUPILATION CUSTOMERS P-8928 S-1273
  if tag is 89281273 then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community IR_1_ESENTEPE_MX960 additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    done
  endif
  #TRAFIC MANUPILATION CUSTOMERS P-1273 S-6762
  if tag is 12736762 then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community 1273:15721 additive
    set community SEABONE_TUZLA_SECONDARY additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    done
  endif
  #TRAFIC MANUPILATION CUSTOMERS P-1273 S-8928
  if tag is 12738928 then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community IR_ESN_1_SECONDARY additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    done
  endif
  #TRAFIC MANUPILATION CUSTOMERS P-1273(Izmir) S-8928
  if tag is 112738928 then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community VCNO_IZMIR_INT1_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community IR_ESN_1_SECONDARY additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    done
  endif
  #TRAFIC MANUPILATION CUSTOMERS P-1273 S-1273
  if tag is 12731273 then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
  endif
  pass
end-policy
!
route-policy TT-ANKARA-BGP-EXPORT-PRIMARY
  #ONLY_ANNOUNCE_FROM_HERE
  if community matches-any DROP_COMM_ONLY_TT_ANKARA_INT_PRI then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #TTNET BLACKHOLE
  if community matches-any TTNET-BLACKHOLE then
    done
  endif
  #DENY BY COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any DONT-ANNOUNCE-TO-TTNET then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INTEROUTE PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8928_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO PEERING PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^3209_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^1273_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT SEABONE TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^6762_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT COGENT IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^174_') then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any Ulakbim then
    drop
  endif
  #VODAFONE_MOBILE
  if community matches-any VF-ANT-GGSN or community matches-any VF-GZM-GGSN then
    prepend as-path 15924 5
    done
  endif
  #VODAFONE_MOBILE
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN or community matches-any VF-PSK-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ADN-GGSN then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-DYB-GGSN or community matches-any VF-SAM-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ERZ-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR1 or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR2 then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ESY-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-PSK-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ADN-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-GZM-Catch_All then
    prepend as-path 15924 6
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_128
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_128 then
    set med 4000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_144
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_144 then
    set med 4000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_160
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_160 then
    set med 4000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_176
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_176 then
    set med 4000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_192
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_192 then
    set med 4000
    done
  endif
  #IZMIR_BLOCKS
  if destination in VF_MOBIL_IZMIR_BLOCK then
    set med 4000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_221
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_221 then
    set med 4000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_0_0
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_0_0 then
    set med 4000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_176_54
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_176_54 then
    set med 4000
    done
  endif
  #MOBILE-ELSE
  if community matches-any MOBILE_ANKARA then
    set med 20000
    done
  endif
  #MOBILE-ELSE
  if community matches-any MOBILE_TUZLA then
    set med 10000
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-TT then
    set med 10000
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-IR or community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-TT then
    set community GLBX_LCL_PREF_100 additive
    set community LVL3_LCL_PREF70 additive
    set community NTT_LCL_PREF96 additive
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  #ADANA_ISG_TEST
  if community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  #ISG_BLOK_1
  if community matches-any VFNET-ULUS-ODM or community matches-any VFNET-BURSA or community matches-any VFNET_ANTALYA or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIT or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT then
    set community TELIA_LCL_PREF_150 additive
    set community GLBX_LCL_PREF_200 additive
    set community LVL3_LCL_PREF80 additive
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  #ISG_BLOK_2
  if community matches-any VFNET_BODRUMISG or community matches-any VFNET-CAMLICA-ISG or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG or community matches-any VFNET_MERSINISG or community matches-any VFNET_KAYSERIISG or community matches-any VFNET_BALIKESIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_AFYONISG or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY or community matches-any VFNET-KADIKOY or community matches-any VFNET-ACIBADEM or community matches-any VFNET-FATIH or community matches-any VFNET-GTEPE then
    set community TELIA_LCL_PREF_150 additive
    set community GLBX_LCL_PREF_200 additive
    set community LVL3_LCL_PREF80 additive
    prepend as-path 15924 6
    done
  endif
  if destination in (185.77.3.0/24, 185.77.0.0/24, 185.67.207.0/24, 185.182.236.0/22, 194.140.227.0/24, 79.170.168.0/24, 46.2.239.0/24, 62.244.247.0/24, 185.67.205.0/24, 37.140.208.0/24, 37.140.209.0/24, 212.109.96.0/20, 212.109.116.0/22, 212.109.120.0/21, 31.7.32.0/24, 31.7.33.0/24, 31.7.34.0/24, 31.7.35.0/24, 31.7.36.0/24, 31.7.37.0/24, 31.7.38.0/24, 31.7.39.0/24, 185.140.124.0/24, 185.140.125.0/24, 185.140.126.0/24, 185.140.127.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #BGP_CUSTOMERS
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    set community TTNET-SDC-YICI additive
    prepend as-path 15924 1
    done
  endif
  #ANONS_KES
  if destination in (46.234.27.0/24, 188.95.144.0/22 ge 22 le 24, 31.145.100.0/24, 31.145.100.0/23, 31.145.109.0/24, 31.145.110.0/24, 31.145.111.0/24, 31.145.112.0/24, 31.145.113.0/24, 31.145.114.0/24, 31.145.115.0/24, 31.145.72.0/24) then
    drop
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS ET
  if destination in (31.145.47.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #SES OZEL
  if destination in (193.243.219.0/24) then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS KES
  if destination in IPSLA_PREFIXES then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-IR or community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-ESENTEPE-ATM then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-ESENTEPE-ME then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any ALLOCATIONS then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-BOSTANCI then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy VirtualDPI-Global-BGP-Export
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0) then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community or community matches-any sol or community matches-any TTNet then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy VirtualDPI-Global-BGP-Import
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any NO-EXPORT-VF then
    set community NO-EXPORT-GLOBAL additive
    pass
  endif
  #PREF_155
  if community matches-any EsentepeCer_Int_NNI_Primary then
    set local-preference 155
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any PREF_155 then
    set local-preference 155
    done
  endif
  #PREF_160
  if community matches-any PREF_160 then
    set local-preference 160
    done
  endif
  #PREF_170
  if community matches-any PREF_170 then
    set local-preference 170
    done
  endif
  #PREF_159
  if community matches-any PREF_159 then
    set local-preference 159
    done
  endif
  #PREF_100
  if community matches-any PREF_100 then
    set local-preference 100
    done
  endif
  set local-preference 200
end-policy
!
route-policy from_KAOPU_TUZLA_ipv4_import
  if destination in KAOPU_Tuzla_Ipv4_Prefixes and as-path in (ios-regex '^138915_') then
    set local-preference 200
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community KAOPU-TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy from_KAOPU_TUZLA_ipv6_import
  if destination in KAOPU_Tuzla_Ipv6_Prefixes and as-path in (ios-regex '^138915_') then
    set local-preference 200
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community KAOPU-TUZLA additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy from_cloudflare_tier1_import
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #Accept-Route-cloudflare 
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^13335_') then
    set local-preference 200
    set community BGP-Customers
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy to_ZenLayer_tier1-BGP-Export
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #Reject-Term-TC-Only
  if community matches-any TC-Only then
    drop
  endif
  #VF_Mobil_Prefixes
  if community matches-any ANK_BOLGE_BGP_CUSTOMERS or community matches-any IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS then
    done
  endif
  # VFNET_DSL_INJECTION
  if destination in (81.8.82.0/24, 95.65.252.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #ofis_ipleri
  if destination in (213.194.95.0/24, 31.145.9.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #Reject-Term
  if community matches-any Dont-Announce-to-Customers then
    drop
  endif
  #International-Pops
  if community matches-any International-Pops then
    drop
  endif
  #Network-Statements
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    done
  endif
  #Datacenter-Networks
  if community matches-any Dc-Blocks then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Bgp-Customers
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_allocations
  if community matches-any allocations then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #yurtici_blackhole
  if community matches-any TTNET-Sadece-yurtici then
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_primary
  if community matches-any announce_from_esentepe_atm then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_backup
  if community matches-any announce_from_esentepe_me or community matches-any announce_from_bostanci then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy to_dora_telekom_tier1_export
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #NETFACTOR-ANNOUNCE-REJECT
  if destination in NETFACTOR-ANNOUNCE-REJECT then
    drop
  endif
  # VFNET_ERLAB
  if destination in (212.15.16.0/20) then
    done
  endif   
  #IP SLA ANONS ET
  if destination in (31.145.48.0/24, 31.145.124.0/24, 31.145.162.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS KES
  if destination in IPSLA_PREFIXES then
    drop
  endif
  #VF_Mobil_Prefixes
  if community matches-any From_VF_to_TNAP then
    done
  endif
  #VF_Mobil_Undesired_announce_reject
  if community matches-any From_VF_to_IR or community matches-any From_VF_to_Local then
    drop
  endif
  # VFNET_DSL_INJECTION
  if destination in (81.8.82.0/24, 95.65.252.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #SPESIFIK_ANONS_TO_SOL
  if destination in (82.150.93.0/24) then
    prepend as-path 15924 3
    done
  endif
  # VFNET-Anons-Spesifik
  if community matches-any VFNET-CAMLICA or community matches-any VFNet-Koza and destination in (193.243.192.0/19, 213.194.110.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #Terramark_Kes
  if community matches-any Terramark then
    drop
  endif
  #ofis_ipleri
  if destination in (213.194.95.0/24, 31.145.9.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #Reject-Term
  if community matches-any Dont-Announce-to-Customers then
    drop
  endif
  #International-Pops
  if community matches-any International-Pops then
    drop
  endif
  #Network-Statements
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    done
  endif
  #Datacenter-Networks
  if community matches-any Dc-Blocks then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Bgp-Customers
  if community matches-any Customers then
    delete community all
    done  
  endif
  #Announce-to-Tnap
  if community matches-any Tnap_out then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_allocations
  if community matches-any allocations then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #blackhole
  if community matches-any blackhole then
    done
  endif
  #yurtici_blackhole
  if community matches-any TTNET-Sadece-yurtici then
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_primary
  if community matches-any announce_from_esentepe_atm then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_backup
  if community matches-any announce_from_esentepe_me or community matches-any announce_from_bostanci then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

route-policy Default-Route-IPv6-BGP-Export
  if destination in ipv6_def then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Default_and_BGP_Customer_Full
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0) then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any Ulakbim then
    done
  endif
  #Reject-Smaller-Than-/24#
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0 ge 25) then
    drop
  endif
  #remove_rfc1918#
  if destination in (10.0.0.0/8 ge 32, 172.16.0.0/12 ge 32, 192.168.0.0/16 ge 32) then
    drop
  endif
  #Reject-Term#
  if community matches-any Dont-Announce-to-Customers then
    drop  
  endif
  #International-Pops#
  if community matches-any International-Pops then
    drop
  endif
  #Only Announce TC Peering
  if community matches-any TC-Only then
    drop
  endif
  #Drop2Tiktok_PNI
  if community matches-any DROP_Tiktok_PNI then
    drop
  endif
  #IP SLA
  if destination in (31.145.48.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #Network-Statements#
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    done
  endif
  #Datacenter-Networks#
  if community matches-any Dc-Blocks then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Upstreams#
  if as-path in Upstreams then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Bgp-Customers#
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Peerings#
  if community matches-any Peerings then
    done
  endif
  #Tr-1#
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    done
  endif
  #Voice-Networks#
  if destination in (212.15.6.0/24, 212.15.13.0/24) then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #bt_nw#
  if destination in (213.194.65.0/24, 213.194.64.0/20) then
    done
  endif
  #geri_kalan#
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IBGP-IMPORT-FROM-ANKARAVF-INT
  pass
end-policy
!
route-policy IBGP-IMPORT-FROM-IZMIRVF-INT2
  pass
end-policy
!
route-policy IC-VFNET-ADANAFTTH-ISG-IMPORT
  if destination in VFNET-ADANAFTTH-ISG-PREFIXES then
    set community VFNET_ADANAFTTHISG additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!

route-policy IPBB-TZL-SECONDARY-BGP-EXPORT
  if destination in (31.145.16.0/24, 81.8.25.0/24, 193.243.192.0/19, 195.87.0.0/17, 195.87.98.0/24, 195.87.239.0/24, 212.115.0.0/20, 212.115.20.0/24, 213.248.128.0/18, 193.243.204.0/24, 193.243.214.0/24, 193.243.219.0/24, 195.87.8.0/24, 195.87.18.0/24, 195.87.41.0/24, 195.87.61.0/24, 195.87.101.0/24, 195.87.219.0/24, 212.12.141.0/24, 212.12.142.0/24, 212.115.16.0/20, 176.219.128.0/20, 149.140.0.0/16, 31.177.128.0/17) then
    prepend as-path 15924
    done
  endif
  if destination in (46.2.224.0/20, 188.3.0.0/19, 31.145.0.0/16, 46.234.0.0/19, 85.119.68.0/22, 91.216.91.0/24, 91.244.116.0/24, 212.98.231.0/24, 212.98.232.0/24, 212.98.233.0/24, 217.64.209.0/24, 213.194.95.0/24, 213.194.96.0/20, 81.8.0.0/17, 134.146.204.0/23, 212.12.132.0/24, 212.12.137.0/24, 212.12.141.0/24, 212.12.155.0/24, 46.31.147.0/24) then
    prepend as-path 15924 2
    done
  endif
  if destination in (46.2.32.0/21, 46.2.44.0/22, 46.2.240.0/24, 95.65.128.0/22, 46.2.16.0/21, 95.65.176.0/23, 188.3.102.0/24, 188.3.88.0/24, 46.2.16.0/21, 46.31.145.0/24, 46.31.148.0/24, 46.31.151.0/24, 79.170.168.0/24, 81.8.13.0/24, 81.8.47.0/24, 81.8.93.0/24, 81.8.109.0/24, 81.8.119.0/24) then
    prepend as-path 15924 2
    done
  endif
  if destination in (84.41.109.0/24, 91.199.191.0/24, 134.146.204.0/23, 195.87.9.0/24, 195.87.25.0/24, 195.87.39.0/24, 195.87.57.0/24, 195.87.145.0/24, 195.87.211.0/24, 212.115.29.0/24, 31.145.8.0/24, 31.145.9.0/24, 31.145.10.0/24, 31.145.11.0/24, 37.140.208.0/24, 46.34.90.0/23, 46.234.0.0/19, 46.234.13.0/24, 62.244.208.0/20, 62.244.223.0/24, 62.244.237.0/24, 62.244.244.0/24, 79.99.176.0/24, 84.44.1.0/24, 84.44.3.0/24, 84.44.7.0/24, 84.44.38.0/24, 85.112.30.0/23, 85.119.68.0/22, 91.229.34.0/24, 212.109.96.0/19, 213.194.64.0/20, 213.238.130.0/24, 213.238.140.0/23, 213.238.150.0/24, 213.238.146.0/24, 194.140.227.0/24) then
    prepend as-path 15924 2
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IQNET-PEERING-IPV6-BGP-EXPORT
  if destination in ipv6_def then
    done
  endif
  if destination in (2a00:1880::/32) then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2001:930::/32) then
    done
  endif
  #VF-Customer-PREFIXES
  if community matches-any Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!         
route-policy IQNET_Ipv6_Tuzlavf_BGP_IMPORT
  if community matches-any VFLPREF70 and destination in IQNET_Ipv6_Prefixes then
    set community GTTLPREF70 additive
    set community TisLPREF70 additive
    set community VCNOLPREF70 additive
    set community LUMENLPREF70 additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community IQNET additive
    set local-preference 70
    done
  endif
  if destination in IQNET_Ipv6_Prefixes and as-path in (ios-regex '^44217_') then
    set local-preference 200
    set community Customers
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy VirtualDPI-DpiLoop-BGP-Export
  if community matches-any ROUTE-KES then
    drop
  endif
  done
end-policy
!
route-policy VirtualDPI-DpiLoop-BGP-Import
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0) then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any sol then
    set local-preference 170
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community or community matches-any sol or community matches-any TTNet then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Vodafone_TUZLA_CGN_BGP-IMPORT
  set community VF_TZL_CGN1 additive
  #DSL BNG STATIC_NON-CGNAT_ISG_PREFIX
  if community matches-any DSL_BNG_STATIC_NON-CGNAT then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 6762:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  #IZMIR_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Izmir-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT additive
    set community IZMIRISG1_DF_Monitor additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive

    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 6762:18612 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive

    set community VCNO_IZMIR_INT1_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SEABONE_PRIMARY_TUZLA_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  #BODRUM_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in BODRUM-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET_BODRUMISG additive
    set community BODRUMISG1_DF_Monitor additive

    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive

    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive

    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done

    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy for_corp_IPv6_TuzlaNNI_import
  set local-preference 200
  done
end-policy
!
route-policy ykb_merkez_gebze_2_bgp_export
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0) then
    done
  endif
  #Reject-Smaller-Than-/24#
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0 ge 25) then
    drop
  endif
  #remove_rfc1918#
  if destination in (10.0.0.0/8 ge 32, 172.16.0.0/12 ge 32, 192.168.0.0/16 ge 32) then
    drop
  endif
  #Reject-Term#
  if community matches-any Dont-Announce-to-Customers then
    drop
  endif
  #International-Pops#
  if community matches-any International-Pops then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any VCNO_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VCNO_ESENTEPE then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any SEABONE then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any INTEROUTE then
    done
  endif
  #Network-Statements#
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    done
  endif
  #Datacenter-Networks#
  if community matches-any Dc-Blocks then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Upstreams#
  if as-path in Upstreams then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Bgp-Customers#
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Peerings#
  if community matches-any Peerings then
    done
  endif
  #Tr-1#
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    done
  endif
  #geri_kalan#
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy ykb_merkez_gebze_2_bgp_import
  if destination in (193.254.228.0/23) then
    set local-preference 200
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community ESENTEPE-CORP-INT-TASIMA additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy AKAMAI-PEERING-IPV4-BGP-IMPORT
  delete community all
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in (23.58.222.0/23) then
    set local-preference 158
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community AKAMAI-TUZLA1 additive
    done
  endif
  #Accept-Route-AKAMAI 
  if as-path in AKAMAI_OZEL_20940 then
    set local-preference 158
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community AKAMAI-TUZLA1 additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy AKAMAI-PEERING-IPV6-BGP-EXPORT
  if destination in (2a00:1880::/32) then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2001:930::/32) then
    done
  endif
  #VF-Customer-PREFIXES
  if community matches-any Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy AKAMAI-PEERING-IPV6-BGP-IMPORT
  delete community all
  #akamai_Nw
  if as-path in AKAMAI_OZEL_20940 then
    set local-preference 215
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community AKAMAI-TUZLA1 additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy AMAZON-PEERING-IPV6-BGP-EXPORT
  if destination in (2a00:1880::/32) then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2001:930::/32) then
    done
  endif
  #VF-Customer-PREFIXES

    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy AMAZON-PEERING-IPV6-BGP-IMPORT
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/48
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in AMAZON_OZEL then
    set local-preference 260
    set community AMAZON_PEERING additive
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy DOGUS_GEBZE_PRIMARY-BGP-IMPORT
  if destination in (185.60.224.0/24, 185.29.192.0/24, 185.29.193.0/24, 185.29.194.0/24, 185.29.195.0/24, 185.60.225.0/24, 31.145.38.128/28, 212.98.208.160/28, 185.163.32.0/22 ge 22 le 24) then
    set local-preference 200
    set community BGP-Customers
    set community (9121:12811) additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (185.60.226.0/24, 91.235.64.0/24, 185.11.213.0/24, 185.11.214.0/24, 185.11.212.0/24, 185.11.215.0/24, 185.60.227.0/24, 217.8.120.0/24, 217.8.121.0/24, 217.8.122.0/24, 217.8.123.0/24) then
    set local-preference 100
    set community BGP-Customers
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

end-policy

  endif

end-policy

!
route-policy IPT_TZL1_VCNO_EXPORT_V6_PARENT
  if community matches-any VCNO_PRIMARY_TUZLA_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    apply IPT_TZL1_VCNO_EXPORT_V6
    done
  elseif community matches-any OTHER_THAN_VCNO_PRIMARY_TUZLA_COMMUNITY then
    prepend as-path 15924 7
    apply IPT_TZL1_VCNO_EXPORT_V6
    done
  else
    apply IPT_TZL1_VCNO_EXPORT_V6
  endif
  drop    
end-policy
!

  if destination in (2a01:718::/32) then
    done
  endif

  if destination in (2001:930::/32) then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    done
  endif
  #VF-Customer-PREFIXES
  if community matches-any Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

  if destination in Fatih-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-FATIH additive
    set community FATIHISG1_DF_Monitor additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18611 additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    set community GGC_Offload additive
    done
  endif
  #GAYRETTEPE_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Gayrettepe-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-GTEPE additive
    set community GAYRETTEPEISG1_DF_Monitor additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18611 additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    set community GGC_Offload additive
    done
  endif
  #KADIKOY_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Kadikoy-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-KADIKOY additive
    set community KADIKOYISG1_DF_Monitor additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 1273:15721 additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  #DUZCE_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Duzce-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-DUZCEISG additive
    set community DUZCEISG1_DF_Monitor additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18612 additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  #ATAKOY1_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Atakoy1-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-ATAKOY additive
    set community ATAKOYISG1_DF_Monitor additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 1273:15721 additive
    set community 6762:18612 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    set community GGC_Offload additive
    done
  endif
  #ATAKOY2_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Atakoy2-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-ATAKOY-2 additive
    set community ATAKOYISG2_DF_Monitor additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 6762:18611 additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    set community GGC_Offload additive
    done
  endif
  #ATAKOY3_ISG_PREFIX
  if destination in Atakoy3-Isg-PREFIXES then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-ATAKOY-2 additive
    set community ATAKOYISG3_DF_Monitor additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community 1273:15721 additive
    set community 6762:18612 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive

    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    set community GGC_Offload additive
    done
  endif
  #DRC_BNG_PREFIX

    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-DRCBNG additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive

    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive

    set community 1273:18622 additive

    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive

    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    set community GGC_Offload additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy from_dora_telekom_tier1_import
  delete community all
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif   
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '9121.*') then
    drop
  endif
  #Accept-Route-sol 
  if destination in Accept-Dora-Telekom or as-path in (ios-regex '^48737_') then
    set local-preference 170
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community Dora_Telekom additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy GECICI1-BGP-TUZLA-EXPORT-PARENT
  if community matches-any GECICI1_TUZLA_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    apply INTERNET_EXIT_TEST_SEABONE
    done
  elseif community matches-any OTHER_THAN_GECICI1_TUZLA_COMMUNITY then
    prepend as-path 15924 7
    apply INTERNET_EXIT_TEST_SEABONE
    done
  else
    apply INTERNET_EXIT_TEST_SEABONE
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IBGP-EXPORT-TO-INTERNET-ROUTERS
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any SEABONE then
    done
  endif
  if destination in Voice-Customers then
    set community Customer-Voice-Subnetted additive
  endif
  if community matches-any PNI_META_COMM then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    set next-hop self
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any MOBIL-INTERNAL-DDOS-MITIGATION then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path is-local then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any TTNET_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VCNO_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_2 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_2 then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IC-VFNET-ERZURUMFTTH-ISG-IMPORT
  if destination in VFNET-ERZURUMFTTH-ISG-PREFIXES then
    set community VFNET_ERZURUMFTTHISG additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IC-VFNET-FATIH-SECONDARY-IMPORT
  if destination in VFNET-FATIH-PREFIXES then
    set community VFNET-FATIH additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy TENCENT-PEERING-IPV6-BGP-EXPORT
  if destination in (2a00:1880::/32) then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2001:930::/32) then
    done
  endif
  #VF-Customer-PREFIXES
  if community matches-any Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy TT-BGP-TUZLA-INT-PRIMARY-EXPORT
  #ONLY_ANNOUNCE_FROM_HERE
  if community matches-any DROP_COMM_ONLY_TT_TUZLA_INT_PRI then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY then
    drop  
  endif
  #TTBLACKHOLE
  if community matches-any TT-BLACKHOLE then
    done
  endif
  #REJECT RFC1918
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT COGENT IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^174_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INTEROUTE PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8928_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO PEERING PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^3209_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^1273_') then
    drop
  endif
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #NETONE REJECT
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^12735_') then
    drop
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS ET
  if destination in (31.145.47.0/24, 31.145.164.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS KES
  if destination in IPSLA_PREFIXES then
    drop
  endif
  #CAMLICA_KOZA_PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET-CAMLICA then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VFNET-KOZA then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any Terramark-Yurtici then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements or community matches-any (15924:700) then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done  
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_128
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_128 then
    set med 2000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_144
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_144 then
    set med 2000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_160
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_160 then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    set med 10000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_176
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_176 then
    set med 2000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_192
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_192 then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    set med 10000
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_221
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_221 then
    set med 10000
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  #NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_0_0
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_46_0_0 then
    set med 2000
    done
  endif
  if destination in NAT44_VF_BLOCKS_176_54 then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    set med 10000
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VFNET_BODRUMISG or community matches-any VFNET-CAMLICA-ISG or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG or community matches-any VFNET_MERSINISG or community matches-any VFNET_KAYSERIISG or community matches-any VFNET_BALIKESIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_AFYONISG or community matches-any VFNET-ULUS-ODM or community matches-any VFNET-BURSA or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY or community matches-any VFNET-KADIKOY or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIT or community matches-any VFNET-ACIBADEM or community matches-any VFNET-FATIH or community matches-any VFNET-GTEPE then
    set community TELIA_LCL_PREF_150 additive
    set community GLBX_LCL_PREF_200 additive
    set community LVL3_LCL_PREF80 additive
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-TT then
    prepend as-path 15924 5
    set community GLBX_LCL_PREF_100 additive
    set community LVL3_LCL_PREF70 additive
    set community NTT_LCL_PREF96 additive
    set community TELIA_LCL_PREF_50 additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-IR or community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-TT then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    set community GLBX_LCL_PREF_100 additive
    set community LVL3_LCL_PREF70 additive
    set community NTT_LCL_PREF96 additive
    set community TELIA_LCL_PREF_50 additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (212.109.96.0/20, 212.109.116.0/22, 212.109.120.0/21, 93.187.66.0/24) then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  #BGP_CUSTOMERS
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-IR or community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-ESENTEPE-ATM then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-ESENTEPE-ME then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any ALLOCATIONS then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-BOSTANCI then
    prepend as-path 15924 10
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy TUZLA-GOOGLE-CACHING-BGP-EXPORT
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif   
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any DO-NOT-ANNOUNCE-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT COGENT IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^174_') then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^6762_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^9121_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INTEROUTE PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8928_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT Superonline PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^34984_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^1273_') then
    drop
  endif
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #VODAFONE_MOBILE
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN or community matches-any VF-PSK-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ADN-GGSN or community matches-any VF-GZM-GGSN then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-ANT-GGSN or community matches-any VF-DYB-GGSN or community matches-any VF-SAM-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ERZ-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR1 or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR2 then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ESY-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-PSK-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ADN-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-GZM-Catch_All then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  #ULAKBIM  
  if community matches-any Ulakbim then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET_BODRUMISG or community matches-any VFNET-BURSA or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG or community matches-any VFNET_MERSINISG or community matches-any VFNET_KAYSERIISG or community matches-any VFNET_BALIKESIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_AFYONISG or community matches-any VFNET-CAMLICA-ISG or community matches-any VFNET-ULUS-ODM or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY or community matches-any VFNET-KADIKOY or community matches-any VFNET-GTEPE or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT or community matches-any VFNET-ACIBADEM or community matches-any VFNET-FATIH then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES FAZ#2
  if community matches-any VFNET_KONYAISG or community matches-any VFNET_ESKISEHIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_HATAYISG or community matches-any VFNET_ERENKOYISG or community matches-any VFNET_GAZIANTEPISG or community matches-any VFNET_DENIZLIISG or community matches-any VFNET_ANTALYAISG or community matches-any VFNET_IZMITISG or community matches-any VFNET_TRABZONISG or community matches-any VFNET_ERZURUMISG or community matches-any VFNET_MANISAISG or community matches-any VFNET_SAKARYAISG then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET-IZMIR_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPE_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ANTALYA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ANKARA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLAFTTH-2 or community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPEFTTH-2 then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Turksat-Antep-Poc-Import-Policy
  if destination in Turksat-Antep-Poc-Prefixes then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    set community 1273:18611 additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Tuzla-VCNO-1274-IPv6-BGP-Export
  if destination in (2a00:1880::/32) then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
  endif
  if destination in (2a01:718::/32) then
    done
  endif
  if destination in VF-ipv6-deny-42 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in VF-ipv6-deny-44-46 then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN03 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN04 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN05 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN06 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN07 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN08 then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2001:930::/32) then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES * FACEBOOK TUZLA PREFIX
  if destination in (2001:930:b7:1::/64) then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any HUAWEI_CLOUD_IPV6 then
    drop
  endif
  #Only Announce TC Peering
  if community matches-any TC-Only then
    drop
  endif
  #BLACKHOLE
  if community matches-any VFNET-ARBOR-BLACKHOLE then
    set community VCNO-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community INTEROUTE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community TT-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community LUMEN-BLACKHOLE additive
    done
  endif
  #VF-Customer-PREFIXES
  if community matches-any Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Tuzla1-Vodafone-IPv6-BGP-Import
  #ISTANBUL_TZL_CGN
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 120
    set community IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community GGC-High-Preference additive
    set community GGC-4G-Services additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 120
    set community IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community GGC-High-Preference additive
    set community GGC-4G-Services additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community 1273:15721 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-Catch_All then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 120
    set community IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community GGC-High-Preference additive
    set community GGC-4G-Services additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  #PURSAKLAR_CGN 
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-GGSN then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 120
    set community IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community GGC-High-Preference additive
    set community GGC-4G-Services additive
    set community VCNO_IZMIR_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-Catch_All then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 120
    set community IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_secondary additive
    set community GGC-High-Preference additive
    set community GGC-4G-Services additive
    set community VCNO_IZMIR_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_ESENTEPE_INT2_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif
  #GAZIEMIR_CGN
  if community matches-any VF-GZM-GGSN then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 120
    set community IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
    set community TTNET-Sadece-yurtici additive
    set community Qwilt_izmir_primary additive
    set community Qwilt_istanbul_secondary additive

    set community 1273:15722 additive
    set community TT_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive

    set community SOL_PRIMARY_IZMIR_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY additive
    set community SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY additive
    set community SEABONE-Lpref90 additive
    done
  endif

    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 120
    set community IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS additive
    set community VFNET_TT additive
