!
route-policy IBGP-IMPORT-FROM-ESN-HOSTING-INT
  pass
end-policy
!
route-policy IC-VFNET-ATAKOY-SECONDARY-IMPORT
  if destination in VFNET-ATAKOY-PREFIXES_ALL then
    set community VFNET-ATAKOY additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Magticom_Ipv4_Tuzlavf_BGP_IMPORT
  delete community all
  if destination in (85.114.224.0/19) then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 140
    set community 6762:18612 additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 6762:20302 additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in (213.157.222.0/24) then
    set local-preference 170
    set community Magticom additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community 1273:18622 additive
    set community 3356:15911 additive
    set community 1273:80 additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in Magticom_Ipv4_Prefixes then
    set local-preference 170
    set community Magticom additive
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Magticom_Ipv6_Tuzlavf_BGP_IMPORT
  delete community all
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/48
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Magticom_Ipv6_Prefixes then
    set local-preference 140
    set community Customers
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Medianova_Mednautilus_BGP_Export
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop  
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/24
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  # VFNET_ERLAB
  if destination in (212.15.16.0/20) then
    done
  endif
  #VF_Mobil_Prefixes
  if community matches-any ANK_BOLGE_BGP_CUSTOMERS or community matches-any IST_AND_BGP_CUSTOMERS then
    done
  endif
  # VFNET_DSL_INJECTION
  if destination in (81.8.82.0/24, 95.65.252.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #SPESIFIK_ANONS_TO_SOL
  if destination in (82.150.93.0/24) then
    prepend as-path 15924 3
    done
  endif
  # VFNET-Anons-Spesifik
  if community matches-any VFNET-CAMLICA or community matches-any VFNet-Koza and destination in (193.243.192.0/19, 213.194.110.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #ofis_ipleri
  if destination in (213.194.95.0/24, 31.145.9.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #Reject-Term
  if community matches-any Dont-Announce-to-Customers then
    drop
  endif
  #International-Pops
  if community matches-any International-Pops then
    drop
  endif
  #Network-Statements
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    done
  endif
  #Datacenter-Networks
  if community matches-any Dc-Blocks then
    done
  endif   
  #Announce-Bgp-Customers
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_allocations
  if community matches-any allocations then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #yurtici_blackhole
  if community matches-any TTNET-Sadece-yurtici then
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_primary
  if community matches-any announce_from_esentepe_atm then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  #esentepe_atm_backup
  if community matches-any announce_from_esentepe_me or community matches-any announce_from_bostanci then
    delete community all
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy NEW-ARBOR-EBGP-IMPORT-PROTECTION
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 and community matches-every ARBOR-RR-REJECT then
    set local-preference 200
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy SEABONE-BGP-TUZLA-PRIMARY-EXPORT
  #ONLY_ANNOUNCE_FROM_HERE
  if community matches-any DROP_COMM_ONLY_SEABONE_TUZLA_INT_PRI then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #F5 CLOUD Service
  if community matches-any F5_CLOUD_DDOS_Servis_Anons_Kes or community matches-any F5_CLOUD_DDOS_ALWAYS_ON then
    drop
  endif
  #Only Announce TC Peering
  if community matches-any TC-Only then
    drop
  endif
  #BLACKHOLE
  if community matches-any VFNET-ARBOR-BLACKHOLE then
    set community VCNO-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community INTEROUTE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community TT-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community LUMEN-BLACKHOLE additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in denemeee then
    done
  endif
  if destination in FTTH-ESENTEPE-PREFIXES then
    done
  endif
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT RFC1918
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT COGENT IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^3356_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT COGENT IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^174_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^9121_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INTEROUTE PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8928_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO PEERING PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^3209_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^1273_') then
    drop
  endif
  #MAGTICOM ANNOUNCE
  if community matches-any Magticom then
    done
  endif
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #NETONE REJECT
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^12735_') then
    drop
  endif
  #DO NOT ANNOUNCE TO INTEROUTE
  if community matches-any DONT-ANNOUNCE-TO-INTEROUTE then
    drop
  endif   
  if community matches-any SEABONE-BLACKHOLE then
    done
  endif
  #ZORLU
  if community matches-any 15924:3838 then
    done
  endif
  #STAFF
  if destination in (213.194.95.0/24) then
    prepend as-path 15924 9
    done
  endif
  #VODAFONE_MOBILE
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN or community matches-any VF-PSK-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ADN-GGSN or community matches-any VF-GZM-GGSN then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-ANT-GGSN or community matches-any VF-DYB-GGSN or community matches-any VF-SAM-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ERZ-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR1 or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR2 then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ESY-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-PSK-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ADN-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-GZM-Catch_All then
    done
  endif
  #MOBILE-ELSE
  if community matches-any MOBILE_ANKARA or community matches-any MOBILE_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  #VF MOBILE PURSAKLAR PREFIXES
  if community matches-any MOBILE_ANKARA or community matches-any MOBILE_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  #VF MOBILE PURSAKLAR PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-IR or community matches-any ANK_BOLGE_BGP_CUSTOMERS then
    done
  endif
  #VF MOBILE PURSAKLAR DESIRED PREFIXES
  if community matches-any From_VF_to_IR or community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-IR then
    done
  endif
  #VF TUZLA PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-IR then
    done
  endif
  #VF MOBILE PURSAKLAR UNDESIRED PREFIXES
  if community matches-any From_VF_to_TNAP or community matches-any From_VF_to_Local or community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-TT or community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  #VF MOBILE TUZLA UNDESIRED PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-TT or community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET CAMLICA HOSTING REJECT
  if community matches-any VFNET-CML-HOSTING then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET_ISG_50G_Traffic
  if community matches-any VFNET-FATIH or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG or community matches-any VFNET-ULUS-ODM or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY-2 then
    done  
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET_SAMSUNISG or community matches-any VFNET_BODRUMISG or community matches-any VFNET-BURSA or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG or community matches-any VFNET_MERSINISG or community matches-any VFNET_KAYSERIISG or community matches-any VFNET_BALIKESIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_AFYONISG or community matches-any VFNET-CAMLICA-ISG or community matches-any VFNET-ULUS-ODM or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY or community matches-any VFNET-KADIKOY or community matches-any VFNET-GTEPE or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT or community matches-any VFNET-ACIBADEM or community matches-any VFNET-FATIH then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES FAZ#2
  if community matches-any VFNET_KONYAISG or community matches-any VFNET_DIYRBAKIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_ESKISEHIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_HATAYISG or community matches-any VFNET_ERENKOYISG or community matches-any VFNET_GAZIANTEPISG or community matches-any VFNET_DENIZLIISG or community matches-any VFNET_ANTALYAISG or community matches-any VFNET_IZMITISG or community matches-any VFNET_TRABZONISG or community matches-any VFNET_ERZURUMISG or community matches-any VFNET_MANISAISG or community matches-any VFNET_SAKARYAISG or community matches-any VFNET-DUZCEISG or community matches-any VFNET_AYDINISG or community matches-any VFNET_CORLUISG then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET-IZMIR_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-ESENYURTFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-ANKARAFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLAFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET_ERZURUMFTTHISG or community matches-any VFNET_SAMSUNFTTHISG or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAFTTHISG or community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPE_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ANTALYA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ANKARA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ZONGULDAK or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLAFTTH-2 or community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPEFTTH-2 then
    done
  endif
  #UNDESIRED PREFIXES
  if destination in UNDESIRED-PREFIXES then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT BY COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any DONT-ANNOUNCE-TO-TTNET then
    drop
  endif
  #P3YOUTUBE_KELEBEK_TEST
  if destination in (31.145.159.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #GarantiTest
  if destination in (217.68.220.0/24, 194.29.214.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS ET
  if destination in (31.145.99.0/24, 195.87.1.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS KES
  if destination in IPSLA_PREFIXES then
    drop
  endif
  #SPESIFIC ANNOUNCE
  if destination in SPECIFIC_ANNOUNCE then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) SUPERNETS
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) ESENTEPE ATM ANNOUNCEMENTS
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-ESENTEPE-ATM then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) ESENTEPE ME ANNOUNCEMENTS
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-ESENTEPE-ME then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) BOSTANCI ANNOUNCEMENTS
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-BOSTANCI then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) ESENTEPE ALLOCATIONS
  if community matches-any ALLOCATIONS then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) BGP CUSTOMERS
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  #REST
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy TUZLA-NETFLIX-CACHING-BGP-EXPORT
  if destination in (188.3.24.0/24, 31.206.240.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any DO-NOT-ANNOUNCE-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in netflix_deny_list then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT COGENT IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^174_') then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^6762_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^9121_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INTEROUTE PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8928_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT Superonline PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^34984_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^1273_') then
    drop  
  endif
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT Cloudfare PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^13335_') then
    drop
  endif
  #VODAFONE_MOBILE
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN or community matches-any VF-PSK-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ADN-GGSN or community matches-any VF-GZM-GGSN then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-ANT-GGSN or community matches-any VF-DYB-GGSN or community matches-any VF-SAM-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ERZ-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR1 or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR2 then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ESY-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-PSK-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ADN-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-GZM-Catch_All then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^$') then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  #ULAKBIM  
  if community matches-any Ulakbim then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET_BODRUMISG or community matches-any VFNET-BURSA or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG or community matches-any VFNET_MERSINISG or community matches-any VFNET_KAYSERIISG or community matches-any VFNET_BALIKESIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_AFYONISG or community matches-any VFNET-DUZCEISG or community matches-any VFNET-ULUS-ODM or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY-2 or community matches-any VFNET-KADIKOY or community matches-any VFNET-GTEPE or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT or community matches-any VFNET-ACIBADEM or community matches-any VFNET-FATIH then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES FAZ#2
  if community matches-any VFNET_KONYAISG or community matches-any VFNET_CORLUISG or community matches-any VFNET_AYDINISG or community matches-any VFNET-DRCBNG or community matches-any VFNET_ESKISEHIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_HATAYISG or community matches-any VFNET_ERENKOYISG or community matches-any VFNET_GAZIANTEPISG or community matches-any VFNET_DENIZLIISG or community matches-any VFNET_ANTALYAISG or community matches-any VFNET_IZMITISG or community matches-any VFNET_TRABZONISG or community matches-any VFNET_ERZURUMISG or community matches-any VFNET_MANISAISG or community matches-any VFNET_SAKARYAISG or community matches-any VFNET-ZONGULDAK then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET-IZMIR_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-ESENYURTFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-ANKARAFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLAFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET_DIYRBAKIRISG or community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPE_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ANTALYA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ANKARA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLAFTTH-2 or community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPEFTTH-2 then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy TuzlaVF-Vodafone-IPv6-BGP-Export
  done
end-policy
!
route-policy TuzlaVF-Vodafone-IPv6-BGP-Import
  if destination in (2a00:1880::/32) and community matches-any VF-TZL-Catch_All then
    set local-preference 120
    set community Customers
    done  
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN and (community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN01-10) then
    set local-preference 120
    set community GGC-High-Preference additive
    set community GGC-4G-Services additive
    set community Customers additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN and (community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN06 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN07 or community matches-any VF-TZL-vGGSN08) then
    set local-preference 120
    set community GGC-High-Preference additive
    set community GGC-4G-Services additive
    set community 1273:18621 additive
    set community Customers additive
    set community 1273:15722 additive
    done
  endif
end-policy
!
route-policy ARBOR-IPV6-EBGP-IMPORT-PROTECTION
  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    set local-preference 200
    set community ARBOR-EXPECTED-COMMUNITIES additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Default_and_AS15924_Origin_EXPORT
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0) then
    done
  endif
  #Reject-Smaller-Than-/24#
  if destination in (0.0.0.0/0 ge 25) then
    drop
  endif
  #remove_rfc1918#
  if destination in (10.0.0.0/8 ge 32, 172.16.0.0/12 ge 32, 192.168.0.0/16 ge 32) then
    drop
  endif
  #Reject-Term#
  if community matches-any Dont-Announce-to-Customers then
    drop
  endif
  #Datacenter-Networks#
  if community matches-any Dc-Blocks then
    done
  endif
  #Announce-Bgp-Customers#
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  if as-path in VATHAS_BGP_Customers then
    done
  endif   
  if as-path is-local then
    done
  endif
  if as-path originates-from '15924'  then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IBGP-IMPORT-FROM-ESENYURTCORP-INT
  pass
end-policy
!
route-policy IBGP-IMPORT-FROM-TUZLAVF-CORP-INT
  pass
end-policy
!
route-policy IC-VFNET-CAMLICA-IMPORT_SECONDARY
  if destination in VFNET-CAMLICAISG-PREFIXES then
    set local-preference 200
    set community VFNET-CAMLICAISG additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IC-VFNET-FATIHTT-SECONDARY-IMPORT
  if destination in VFNET-FATIH-PREFIXES then
    set community VFNET-FATIH additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IC-VFNET-KADIKOY-SECONDARY-IMPORT
  if destination in VFNET-KADIKOY-PREFIXES then
    set community VFNET-KADIKOY additive
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set local-preference 200
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IPT_TZL1_SEABONE_EXPORT_V6_PARENT
  if community matches-any SEABONE_PRIMARY_TUZLA_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    apply IPT_TZL1_SEABONE_EXPORT_V6
    done
  elseif community matches-any OTHER_THAN_SEABONE_PRIMARY_TUZLA_COMMUNITY then
    prepend as-path 15924 7
    apply IPT_TZL1_SEABONE_EXPORT_V6
    done
  else    
    apply IPT_TZL1_SEABONE_EXPORT_V6
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Peering_IPV6-BGP-EXPORT-VFTR_only
  if destination in (2a00:1880::/32) then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2001:930::/32) then
    done
  endif
  #VF-Customer-PREFIXES
  if community matches-any Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy TUZLA-FACEBOOK-CACHING-BGP-EXPORT
  #REMOVE_RFC1918 
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any DO-NOT-ANNOUNCE-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT COGENT IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^174_') then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^6762_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^9121_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INTEROUTE PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8928_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT Superonline PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^34984_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^1273_') then
    drop
  endif   
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #VODAFONE_MOBILE
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN then
    set community 32934:10008
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ADN-GGSN or community matches-any VF-GZM-GGSN then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-ANT-GGSN or community matches-any VF-DYB-GGSN or community matches-any VF-SAM-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ERZ-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR1 or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR2 then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ESY-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-PSK-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ADN-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-GZM-Catch_All then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  #ULAKBIM  
  if community matches-any Ulakbim then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET_BODRUMISG or community matches-any VFNET-BURSA or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG or community matches-any VFNET_MERSINISG or community matches-any VFNET_KAYSERIISG or community matches-any VFNET_BALIKESIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_AFYONISG or community matches-any VFNET-DUZCEISG or community matches-any VFNET-ULUS-ODM or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY-2 or community matches-any VFNET-KADIKOY or community matches-any VFNET-GTEPE or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT or community matches-any VFNET-ACIBADEM or community matches-any VFNET-FATIH then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES FAZ#2
  if community matches-any VFNET_KONYAISG or community matches-any VFNET_CORLUISG or community matches-any VFNET_AYDINISG or community matches-any VFNET-DRCBNG or community matches-any VFNET_ESKISEHIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_HATAYISG or community matches-any VFNET_ERENKOYISG or community matches-any VFNET_GAZIANTEPISG or community matches-any VFNET_DENIZLIISG or community matches-any VFNET_ANTALYAISG or community matches-any VFNET_IZMITISG or community matches-any VFNET_TRABZONISG or community matches-any VFNET_ERZURUMISG or community matches-any VFNET_MANISAISG or community matches-any VFNET_SAKARYAISG or community matches-any VFNET-ZONGULDAK then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET-IZMIR_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-ESENYURTFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-ANKARAFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLAFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET_DIYRBAKIRISG or community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPE_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ANTALYA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ANKARA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLAFTTH-2 or community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPEFTTH-2 then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET 
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^$') then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy VCNO-BGP-TUZLA-INT-PRIMARY-EXPORT
  #ONLY_ANNOUNCE_FROM_HERE
  if community matches-any DROP_COMM_ONLY_VCNO_TUZLA_INT_PRI then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #F5 CLOUD Service
  if community matches-any F5_CLOUD_DDOS_Servis_Anons_Kes or community matches-any F5_CLOUD_DDOS_ALWAYS_ON then
    drop
  endif
  #Only Announce TC Peering
  if community matches-any TC-Only then
    drop
  endif
  #BLACKHOLE
  if community matches-any VFNET-ARBOR-BLACKHOLE then
    set community VCNO-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community INTEROUTE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community TT-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community LUMEN-BLACKHOLE additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VCNO-BLACKHOLE then
    done
  endif
  if destination in denemeee then
    done
  endif
  if destination in FTTH-ESENTEPE-PREFIXES then
    done
  endif
  if destination in Smaller_Than_24 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT RFC1918
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT COGENT IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^3356_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT COGENT IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^174_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT TT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^9121_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INTEROUTE PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8928_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT SEABONE IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^6762_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO PEERING PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^3209_') then
    drop
  endif
  #MAGTICOM ANNOUNCE
  if community matches-any Magticom then
    done
  endif
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #NETONE REJECT
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^12735_') then
    drop
  endif
  #DO NOT ANNOUNCE TO INTEROUTE
  if community matches-any DONT-ANNOUNCE-TO-INTEROUTE then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT BY COMMUNITY
  if community matches-any DONT-ANNOUNCE-TO-TTNET then
    drop
  endif
  #VODAFONE_MOBILE
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN or community matches-any VF-PSK-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ADN-GGSN or community matches-any VF-GZM-GGSN then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-ANT-GGSN or community matches-any VF-DYB-GGSN or community matches-any VF-SAM-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ERZ-GGSN or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR1 or community matches-any VF-ESY-GGSN-GR2 then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VF-TZL-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ESY-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-PSK-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-ADN-Catch_All or community matches-any VF-GZM-Catch_All then
    done
  endif
  #MOBILE-ELSE
  if community matches-any MOBILE_ANKARA or community matches-any MOBILE_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  #VF MOBILE PURSAKLAR PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-IR or community matches-any ANK_BOLGE_BGP_CUSTOMERS then
    done
  endif
  #VF MOBILE PURSAKLAR DESIRED PREFIXES
  if community matches-any From_VF_to_IR or community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-IR then
    done
  endif
  #VF TUZLA PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-IR then
    done
  endif
  #VF MOBILE PURSAKLAR UNDESIRED PREFIXES
  if community matches-any From_VF_to_TNAP or community matches-any From_VF_to_Local or community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-TT or community matches-any VF-PSK-PRFX-TO-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  #VF MOBILE TUZLA UNDESIRED PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-TT or community matches-any VF-TUZLA-PRFX-TO-TNAP then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET CAMLICA HOSTING REJECT
  if community matches-any VFNET-CML-HOSTING then
    drop
  endif
  #VFNET_ISG_50G_Traffic
  if community matches-any VFNET-FATIH or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG or community matches-any VFNET-ULUS-ODM or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY-2 then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET_SAMSUNISG or community matches-any VFNET_BODRUMISG or community matches-any VFNET-BURSA or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAISG or community matches-any VFNET_MERSINISG or community matches-any VFNET_KAYSERIISG or community matches-any VFNET_BALIKESIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_AFYONISG or community matches-any VFNET-CAMLICA-ISG or community matches-any VFNET-ULUS-ODM or community matches-any VFNET-ATAKOY or community matches-any VFNET-KADIKOY or community matches-any VFNET-GTEPE or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRHATAYTT or community matches-any VFNET-ACIBADEM or community matches-any VFNET-FATIH then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES FAZ#2
  if community matches-any VFNET_KONYAISG or community matches-any VFNET_DIYRBAKIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_ESKISEHIRISG or community matches-any VFNET_HATAYISG or community matches-any VFNET_ERENKOYISG or community matches-any VFNET_GAZIANTEPISG or community matches-any VFNET_DENIZLIISG or community matches-any VFNET_ANTALYAISG or community matches-any VFNET_IZMITISG or community matches-any VFNET_TRABZONISG or community matches-any VFNET_ERZURUMISG or community matches-any VFNET_MANISAISG or community matches-any VFNET_SAKARYAISG or community matches-any VFNET-DUZCEISG or community matches-any VFNET_AYDINISG or community matches-any VFNET_CORLUISG then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET-IZMIR_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-IZMIRFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-ESENYURTFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-ANKARAFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLAFTTHBNG01 or community matches-any VFNET_ERZURUMFTTHISG or community matches-any VFNET_SAMSUNFTTHISG or community matches-any VFNET_ADANAFTTHISG or community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPE_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ANTALYA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ANKARA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLA_FTTH or community matches-any VFNET-ZONGULDAK or community matches-any VFNET-TUZLAFTTH-2 or community matches-any VFNET-ESENTEPEFTTH-2 then
    done
  endif
  #NO_PREPEND_FOR_CUSTOMERS
  if community matches-any 15924:3838 then
    done
  endif
  #UNDESIRED PREFIXES
  if destination in UNDESIRED-PREFIXES then
    drop
  endif
  #P3YOUTUBE_KELEBEK_TEST
  if destination in (31.145.155.0/24, 62.244.224.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS ET
  if destination in (31.145.48.0/24) then
    done
  endif
  #IP SLA ANONS KES
  if destination in IPSLA_PREFIXES then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in SPECIFIC_ANNOUNCE_NEW then
    done
  endif
  #SPESIFIC ANNOUNCE
  if destination in SPECIFIC_ANNOUNCE then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) SUPERNETS
  if community matches-any Bgp-Main-Network-Statements then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) ESENTEPE ATM ANNOUNCEMENTS
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-ESENTEPE-ATM then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) ESENTEPE ME ANNOUNCEMENTS
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-ESENTEPE-ME then
    done  
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) BOSTANCI ANNOUNCEMENTS
  if community matches-any ANNOUNCE-FROM-BOSTANCI then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) ESENTEPE ALLOCATIONS
  if community matches-any ALLOCATIONS then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET (VATHAS) BGP CUSTOMERS
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    done
  endif
  #REST
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy from_cloudflare_tier1_import_ipv6
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^13335_') then
    set local-preference 200
    set community BGP-Customers
    set community TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!

    drop
  endif

    set community BGP-Customers additive
    set community PREF_170 additive
    set local-preference 160
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

    set local-preference 160
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

  endif

route-policy TUZLA-SEABONE-300G-IPv6-BGP-Import

  if destination in Smaller_than_48 then
    drop

    set community SEABONE_IPV6 additive
    done
  endif

!
route-policy TUZLA-SEABONE-6762-IPv6-BGP-Export
  if destination in (2a00:1880::/32) then
    prepend as-path 15924 5
  endif
  if destination in (2a01:718::/32) then
    done
  endif
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^13335_') then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    done
  endif   
  #Test_IPV6_blackhole_PREFIX
  if destination in (2001:930:9a::164/128) then
    set community Customers additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2001:930::/32) then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    done
  endif
  if destination in VF-ipv6-deny-42 then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    drop
  endif
  #BLACKHOLE
  if community matches-any VFNET-ARBOR-BLACKHOLE then
    set community VCNO-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community SEABONE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community INTEROUTE-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community TT-BLACKHOLE additive
    set community LUMEN-BLACKHOLE additive
    done
  endif
  #VF-Customer-PREFIXES
  if community matches-any Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!

!

  delete community all
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop  
  endif
  #REJECT_SMALLER_THAN-/48

    drop
  endif

    set community sol additive
    done
  endif

end-policy

!
route-policy ibgp_export_inet_to_rr_from_int_rt
  if destination in (10.135.198.176/28, 10.135.193.80/28, 10.135.54.128/30) then
    done
  endif
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in (10.190.30.113/32, 10.190.30.115/32) then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any ESY_TMS_Tasinma_Gecici then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any MOBIL-INTERNAL-DDOS-MITIGATION then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Voice-Customers then
    set community Customer-Voice-Subnetted additive
  endif
  #ISG_SOL_RR_Deny
  if community matches-any ISG_SOL_RR_Deny then
    drop
  endif
  #ACCEPT TNAP PREFIXES
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any TTNET_TUZLA and destination in Default then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VCNO_TUZLA and destination in Default then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any SEABONE and destination in Default then
    done
  endif   
  if community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_2 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_2 then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    set next-hop self
    done
  endif
  if as-path is-local then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

    done

    drop
  endif

    set local-preference 150
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif   
  if community matches-any PREF_160 and destination in VF-Mobil-Corporate-Prefixes then
    set local-preference 160
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any PREF_159 and destination in VF-Mobil-Corporate-Prefixes then
    set local-preference 159
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any PREF_155 and destination in VF-Mobil-Corporate-Prefixes then
    set local-preference 155
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  if destination in VF-Mobil-Corporate-Prefixes then
    set local-preference 100
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

    drop
  endif

    drop
  endif
  if destination in Default then
    drop
  endif

    drop
  endif

    drop
  endif

  if as-path in (ios-regex '^9121_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT INTEROUTE PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^8928_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT Superonline PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^34984_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT VCNO IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^1273_') then
    drop
  endif
  #REJECT LEVEL3 IP TRANSIT PREFIXES
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^3356_') then
    drop
  endif
  #TNAP REJECT
  if community matches-any TIER1-GLOBAL-COMMUNITY then
    drop
  endif
  #Drop2Cloudfare_PNI
  if community matches-any DROP_Cloudfare_PNI then
    drop

  if community matches-any VF-GZM-vGGSN05 then
    done

    done
  endif
  #ULAKBIM  
  if community matches-any Ulakbim then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET BIRI PREFIXES
  if community matches-any VFNET_BODRUMISG then
    done
  endif
  #VFNET
  if as-path in (ios-regex '^$') then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy

    done
  endif
  #VFNET IPV6 PREFIXES
  if destination in (2001:930::/32) then
    done
  endif
  #VF-Customer-PREFIXES
  if community matches-any Customers then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy VCNO-DDOS-BGP-TUZLA-INT-PRIMARY-EXPORT
  if destination in (213.248.162.0/23) then
    done
  endif
  #REST
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy ethica_sigorta_sogutozu_int-BGP-IMPORT
  if destination in (185.156.4.0/24) then
    set local-preference 190
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy SEABONE-BGP-TUZLA-PRIMARY-EXPORT-PARENT
  if community matches-any SEABONE_PRIMARY_TUZLA_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    apply SEABONE-BGP-TUZLA-PRIMARY-EXPORT
    done
  elseif community matches-any OTHER_THAN_SEABONE_PRIMARY_TUZLA_COMMUNITY then
    prepend as-path 15924 7
    apply SEABONE-BGP-TUZLA-PRIMARY-EXPORT
    done
  else
    apply SEABONE-BGP-TUZLA-PRIMARY-EXPORT
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IBGP-EXPORT-TO-Esenyurt-INTERNET-ROUTERS
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if community matches-any SEABONE then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any PNI_META_COMM then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any ESY_TMS_Tasinma_Gecici then
    done
  endif
  if destination in Voice-Customers then
    set community Customer-Voice-Subnetted additive
  endif
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    set next-hop self
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any MOBIL-INTERNAL-DDOS-MITIGATION then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path is-local then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any TTNET_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VCNO_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_2 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_2 then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IBGP-EXPORT-TO-INTERNET-ROUTERS-FOR-IPv6
  #IP_Transit_Ipv6_Prefixes
  if community matches-any VCNO_IPV6 or community matches-any SEABONE_IPV6 then
    done
  endif
  #Peering_Ipv6_Prefixes
  if community matches-any tier1_global_community then
    done
  endif
  #Internet_Customers_Ipv6_Prefixes
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    set next-hop self
    done
  endif
  if destination in Ipv6_IntRouter_Loopbacks_Range then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path is-local then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Medianova_Mednautilus_BGP_Import_Primary
  #REJECT INVALID RPKI
  if validation-state is invalid then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Medianova_Mednautilus-Prefixes then
    set local-preference 200
    set community BGP-Customers
    set community Customer_Primary_Community additive
    set community tier1_global_community additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy SOL-TUZLA-IPv6-BGP-EXPORT-PRIMARY-PARENT
  if community matches-any SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY then
    prepend as-path 15924 2
    apply TUZLA-TSOL-PEERING-IPV6-BGP-EXPORT
    done
  elseif community matches-any SOL_PRIMARY_TUZLA_INT_COMMUNITY_PRIMARY then
    apply TUZLA-TSOL-PEERING-IPV6-BGP-EXPORT
    done
  else
    apply TUZLA-TSOL-PEERING-IPV6-BGP-EXPORT
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy VCNO-BGP-TUZLA-INT-PRIMARY-EXPORT-PARENT
  if community matches-any VCNO_PRIMARY_TUZLA_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    apply VCNO-BGP-TUZLA-INT-PRIMARY-EXPORT
    done
  elseif community matches-any OTHER_THAN_VCNO_PRIMARY_TUZLA_COMMUNITY then
    prepend as-path 15924 7
    apply VCNO-BGP-TUZLA-INT-PRIMARY-EXPORT
    done
  else
    apply VCNO-BGP-TUZLA-INT-PRIMARY-EXPORT
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IBGP-EXPORT-TO-INTERNET-ROUTERS-TUZLA_CORP
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Voice-Customers then
    set community Customer-Voice-Subnetted additive
  endif
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    set next-hop self
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any MOBIL-INTERNAL-DDOS-MITIGATION then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path is-local then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any TTNET_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any SEABONE then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VCNO_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_2 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_2 then
    done
  endif
  if destination in (217.31.224.0/19) then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IBGP-EXPORT-TO-NON-BACKUP-INTERNET-ROUTERS
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Voice-Customers then
    set community Customer-Voice-Subnetted additive
  endif
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    set next-hop self
    done
  endif
  if as-path is-local then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy Quick_Sigorta_Esenyurt_Dc_BGP_backup_Import
  if destination in Quick_Sigorta_Esenyurt_Dc_prefixes then
    set local-preference 160
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  drop    
end-policy
!
route-policy wifiturk_taskaya_elektronik_yeni_BGP_import
  if community matches-any VFNET_BLACKHOLE_COMMUNITY then
    set local-preference 120
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any NO-EXPORT-VF then
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any NO-ADVERTISE-VF then
    set community NO-ADVERTISE-GLOBAL additive
    pass
  endif
  if destination in wifiturk_taskaya_elektronik_yeni_BGP_import_prefixes then
    set local-preference 140
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy IBGP-EXPORT-TO-INTERNET-ROUTERS-ESENTEPE_INT3
  if destination in Reject-RFC1918 then
    drop
  endif
  if destination in Voice-Customers then
    set community Customer-Voice-Subnetted additive
  endif
  if community matches-any BGP-Customers then
    set next-hop self
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any MOBIL-INTERNAL-DDOS-MITIGATION then
    drop
  endif
  if as-path is-local then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any TTNET_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any SEABONE then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any VCNO_TUZLA then
    done
  endif
  if community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_GNS_2 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_1 or community matches-any NSU_IPBB_TZL_2 then
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy VCNO-DDOS-BGP-TUZLA-INT-PRIMARY-EXPORT-PARENT
  if community matches-any VCNO_DDOS_PRIMARY_TUZLA_COMMUNITY_SECONDARY then
    prepend as-path 15924 4
    apply VCNO-DDOS-BGP-TUZLA-INT-PRIMARY-EXPORT
    done
  elseif community matches-any OTHER_THAN_VCNO_DDOS_PRIMARY_TUZLA_COMMUNITY then
    prepend as-path 15924 7
    apply VCNO-DDOS-BGP-TUZLA-INT-PRIMARY-EXPORT
    done
  else
    apply VCNO-DDOS-BGP-TUZLA-INT-PRIMARY-EXPORT
  endif
  drop
end-policy
!
route-policy ethica_sigorta_sogutozu_secondary_int_BGP_IMPORT
  if destination in (185.156.4.0/24) then
    set local-preference 180
    set community BGP-Customers additive
    done
  endif
  drop
end-policy
